items.title: DROPS: Managing Serverless Resource Pools in Microsoft Azure Functions.
items.abstract:
Azure Functions maintains pools of pre-warmed containers to avoid the high container-allocation latency. The size of a pool is important: a pool that is too small leads to high allocation latency, whereas a pool that is too large wastes resources and increases cost. Service providers typically oversize pools to meet service-level objectives (SLOs). Our findings indicate that the cost of maintaining pre-warmed container pools dominates the overall platform cost, motivating the need for effective pool management strategies.

We characterize container-allocation traces from Azure Functions, revealing key findings: the demand for container allocation is highly bursty, while the supply of new containers is virtually unlimited but may have long delays. Traditional resource management approaches, which rely on prediction or reactive techniques, fail to reduce costs while meeting the target SLO due to the bursty nature of the workload. These insights lead us to develop a new statistical, data-driven pool optimization method that uses historical traces to compute the size of each pool. Our evaluation shows that the proposed method meets the target SLO while reducing the operational cost by 41% compared to the static approach employed earlier in the production platform.
items.abstract_zh:
Azure Functions 维护预热容器池，以避免高容器分配延迟。池的大小很重要：池太小会导致较高的分配延迟，而池太大会浪费资源并增加成本。服务提供商通常会超大池以满足服务级别目标 (SLO)。我们的研究结果表明，维护预热容器池的成本在整个平台成本中占主导地位，这激发了对有效池管理策略的需求。

我们描述了 Azure Functions 的容器分配跟踪，揭示了重要发现：容器分配的需求是高度突发的，而新容器的供应几乎是无限的，但可能会有很长的延迟。由于工作负载的突发性，依赖于预测或反应技术的传统资源管理方法无法在满足目标 SLO 的同时降低成本。这些见解引导我们开发一种新的统计、数据驱动的池优化方法，该方法使用历史跟踪来计算每个池的大小。我们的评估表明，与生产平台中早期采用的静态方法相比，所提出的方法满足了目标 SLO，同时将运营成本降低了 41%。

items.title: Rose: Reproducing External-Fault-Induced Failures in Distributed Systems with Lightweight Instrumentation.
items.abstract: Distributed systems form the backbone of critical infrastructures, yet remain vulnerable to external-fault-induced bugs that manifest only when specific external events occur during specific application states. Existing approaches to reproducing these bugs require fine-grained information about the application, which might not be available in production, and operate within a limited fault model. Rose is a novel approach that collects traces from production and systematically generates fault schedules that reproduce these bugs. By leveraging the insight that external faults are observable through system interfaces, Rose uses lightweight tracing (2.6% overhead) to capture essential application-environment interactions. Then, it identifies the application states when faults must occur to trigger bugs, and generates schedules that consistently reproduce these bugs. Rose reproduced 20 bugs across eight production systems implemented in diverse languages (C, C++, Java, Go, Scala), including widely-used systems such as Zookeeper, MongoDB, and HBase.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式系统构成了关键基础设施的支柱，但仍然容易受到外部故障引起的错误的影响，这些错误仅在特定应用程序状态期间发生特定外部事件时才会显现。重现这些错误的现有方法需要有关应用程序的细粒度信息，这些信息可能在生产中不可用，并且在有限的故障模型内运行。 Rose 是一种新颖的方法，它从生产中收集痕迹并系统地生成重现这些错误的故障计划。通过利用外部故障可通过系统接口观察的洞察力，Rose 使用轻量级跟踪（2.6% 开销）来捕获重要的应用程序环境交互。然后，它会识别何时必须发生故障才能触发错误的应用程序状态，并生成一致地重现这些错误的时间表。 Rose 在用不同语言（C、C++、Java、Go、Scala）实现的 8 个生产系统中重现了 20 个错误，其中包括广泛使用的系统，例如 Zookeeper、MongoDB 和 HBase。

items.title: FUR: Fast and Unlimited Reads on Persistent Memory Transactions.
items.abstract:
Despite the recent improvements in supporting Persistent Hardware Transactions (PHTs) on emerging persistent memories (PM), they have largely overlooked the poor performance of Read-Only (RO) transactions, which suffer from two crucial bottlenecks: i) the considerable post-commit delays required to ensure consistency with concurrent update transactions; and ii) the well-known tight read capacity limits of the commercially available HTM implementations.

We propose FUR, a new design for PHT that eliminates the two most crucial bottlenecks that hinder RO transactions in state-of-the-art PHT. At its core, FUR exploits advanced instructions that some contemporary HTMs provide to suspend (and resume) transactional access tracking.

With the exception of workloads comprised of 100% update transactions, our experimental evaluation with an IBM POWER9 system using the TPC-C benchmark shows that FUR can outperform the state of the art designs for persistent hardware (SPHT) and software memory transactions (Pisces or SpecPMT-based) by up to 6.17×.
items.abstract_zh:
尽管最近在新兴持久性存储器 (PM) 上支持持久性硬件事务 (PHT) 方面取得了进展，但它们在很大程度上忽视了只读 (RO) 事务的较差性能，只读 (RO) 事务存在两个关键瓶颈：i) 确保与并发更新事务的一致性所需的相当大的提交后延迟； ii) 众所周知的商用 HTM 实现的严格读取容量限制。

我们提出了 FUR，一种 PHT 的新设计，消除了阻碍最先进的 PHT 中 RO 交易的两个最关键的瓶颈。 FUR 的核心是利用一些当代 HTM 提供的高级指令来暂停（和恢复）事务访问跟踪。

除了由 100% 更新事务组成的工作负载之外，我们使用 TPC-C 基准对 IBM POWER9 系统进行的实验评估表明，FUR 的性能比持久硬件 (SPHT) 和软件内存事务（基于 Pisces 或 SpecPMT）的最先进设计高出 6.17 倍。

items.title: Concord: Learning Network Configuration Contracts.
items.abstract: Misconfiguration is frequently cited as a leading cause of service disruptions and outages. To prevent misconfiguration, we introduce network contracts—lightweight configuration checks that run efficiently, localize errors to specific lines, and require no heavyweight modeling of network protocols. We develop a tool Concord to learn contracts automatically from example network configurations. By checking these learned contracts against new or changed configurations, Concord finds likely configuration bugs before they can impact the network. Key to our approach is a scalable algorithm for learning "relational" contracts that capture complex dependencies between configuration settings. We deployed Concord as part of a cloud-based configuration management service and evaluated its scalability, coverage, precision, and utility on two large real-world configuration datasets.
items.abstract_zh: 配置错误经常被认为是服务中断和中断的主要原因。为了防止错误配置，我们引入了网络契约——可以高效运行的轻量级配置检查，将错误定位到特定线路，并且不需要对网络协议进行重量级建模。我们开发了一个工具 Concord，可以从示例网络配置中自动学习合约。通过根据新的或更改的配置检查这些学习合约，Concord 可以在可能的配置错误影响网络之前发现它们。我们方法的关键是用于学习“关系”合约的可扩展算法，该算法捕获配置设置之间的复杂依赖关系。我们将 Concord 部署为基于云的配置管理服务的一部分，并在两个大型实际配置数据集上评估了其可扩展性、覆盖范围、精度和实用性。

items.title: Yield Not Thy Core.
items.abstract:
Programming distributed systems has never been easier, but making them perform well and efficiently exploit available resources remains difficult. Fast programs on a single host slow to a crawl when given more resources, while systems designed for scale squander resources on modest problems.

We present Magpie, a programming model and framework for building high-performance, data-intensive applications. Magpie provides the straightforward guarantee that fast code remains fast when distributed. Because application code performs best when executed without interruptions, Magpie takes protocol off the critical path, automatically orchestrating the placement of data and computation to ensure uninterrupted local compute whenever possible. This flexibility requires extreme adaptivity , postponing all decisions about movement and placement until runtime. To support this finegrained adaptivity, distributed computations in Magpie are structured as compositions of lightweight transactions over distributed objects, both of which may move freely through the system.

To showcase Magpie's performance and generality, we develop two very different libraries: a high-performance key-value store and a graph processing system. We show that Magpie achieves parity with or outperforms state of the art systems in both areas while providing richer guarantees.
items.abstract_zh:
对分布式系统进行编程从未如此简单，但让它们表现良好并有效利用可用资源仍然很困难。当给予更多资源时，单个主机上的快速程序会变得缓慢，而为规模设计的系统会在适度的问题上浪费资源。

我们推出 Magpie，一种用于构建高性能、数据密集型应用程序的编程模型和框架。 Magpie 提供了直接的保证，即快速代码在分发时仍然保持快速。由于应用程序代码在不间断执行时性能最佳，因此 Magpie 将协议从关键路径中剔除，自动编排数据和计算的放置，以确保尽可能不间断的本地计算。这种灵活性需要极高的适应性，将所有有关移动和放置的决策推迟到运行时。为了支持这种细粒度的适应性，Magpie 中的分布式计算被构造为分布式对象上的轻量级事务的组合，这两者都可以在系统中自由移动。

为了展示 Magpie 的性能和通用性，我们开发了两个截然不同的库：高性能键值存储和图形处理系统。我们表明，Magpie 在这两个领域都达到了与最先进的系统相当或优于最先进的系统，同时提供了更丰富的保证。

items.title: REPS: Recycled Entropy Packet Spraying for Adaptive Load Balancing and Failure Mitigation.
items.abstract: Next-generation datacenters require highly efficient network load balancing to manage the growing scale of artificial intelligence (AI) training and general datacenter traffic. However, existing Ethernet-based solutions, such as Equal Cost Multi-Path (ECMP) and oblivious packet spraying (OPS), struggle to maintain high network utilization due to both increasing traffic demands and the expanding scale of datacenter topologies, which also exacerbate network failures. To address these limitations, we propose REPS, a lightweight decentralized per-packet adaptive load balancing algorithm designed to optimize network utilization while ensuring rapid recovery from link failures. REPS adapts to network conditions by caching good-performing paths. In case of a network failure, REPS re-routes traffic away from it in less than 100 microseconds. REPS is designed to be deployed with next-generation out-of-order transports, such as Ultra Ethernet, and uses less than 25 bytes of per-connection state regardless of the topology size. We extensively evaluate REPS in large-scale simulations and FPGA-based NICs.
items.abstract_zh: 下一代数据中心需要高效的网络负载平衡来管理不断增长的人工智能 (AI) 训练规模和一般数据中心流量。然而，现有的基于以太网的解决方案，例如等价多路径（ECMP）和不经意的数据包喷射（OPS），由于流量需求的增加和数据中心拓扑规模的扩大而难以维持高网络利用率，这也加剧了网络故障。为了解决这些限制，我们提出了 REPS，这是一种轻量级分散式每数据包自适应负载平衡算法，旨在优化网络利用率，同时确保从链路故障中快速恢复。 REPS 通过缓存性能良好的路径来适应网络条件。如果出现网络故障，REPS 将在不到 100 微秒的时间内重新路由流量。 REPS 设计为与下一代无序传输（例如超以太网）一起部署，并且无论拓扑大小如何，每个连接状态都使用不到 25 字节。我们在大规模模拟和基于 FPGA 的 NIC 中广泛评估 REPS。

items.title: Scalable RDMA-accelerated Distributed Locks with Shared Stream Abstraction.
items.abstract: Blazing fast RDMA technology revolutionizes modern distributed systems and propels them to offload performance-critical data paths onto this network fabric. Designing an RDMA-optimized data path needs to clear a main hurdle—non-scalable distributed locks. Through a performance dissection of existing lock schemes, we find that software-based lock request ordering and polling-based lock ownership transfer scale poorly, leading to high NIC contention and heavy network congestion. To resolve these bottlenecks, this paper proposes StreamLock, a scalable lock primitive that co-designs the distributed lock protocol with fast RDMA networks. The core of StreamLock is a novel shared stream abstraction with two mechanisms: ( i ) scalable request ordering by repurposing the line-speed packet receiving provided by modern NICs; ( ii ) peer-to-peer notification to achieve one-round-trip-time lock ownership transfer. We implement StreamLock with off-the-shelf RDMA NICs and compare it with state-of-the-art distributed locks. Comprehensive experimental results showcase that StreamLock outperforms them significantly.
items.abstract_zh: 极快的 RDMA 技术彻底改变了现代分布式系统，并推动它们将性能关键的数据路径卸载到此网络结构上。设计 RDMA 优化的数据路径需要清除一个主要障碍——不可扩展的分布式锁。通过对现有锁方案的性能剖析，我们发现基于软件的锁请求排序和基于轮询的锁所有权转移扩展性很差，导致 NIC 争用和严重的网络拥塞。为了解决这些瓶颈，本文提出了 StreamLock，这是一种可扩展的锁原语，它与快速 RDMA 网络共同设计分布式锁协议。 StreamLock 的核心是一种新颖的共享流抽象，具有两种机制：（i）通过重新利用现代 NIC 提供的线速数据包接收来实现可扩展的请求排序； (ii)点对点通知，实现锁所有权的一次往返转移。我们使用现成的 RDMA NIC 实现 StreamLock，并将其与最先进的分布式锁进行比较。综合实验结果表明 StreamLock 的性能明显优于它们。

items.title: ECCB: Boosting Block Propagation of Blockchain with Erasure-Coded Compact Block.
items.abstract: Blockchain, the cornerstone for building the next generation of trustworthy web, suffers from poor scalability. Accelerating block propagation among blockchain nodes through block compression is an effective approach to improving scalability. However, existing block compression techniques, due to either low compression ratios or high recommunication ratios, induce either high transmission latency (proportional to block size, for a given Internet bandwidth) or multi-round Internet delay (dominated by geographical separation), causing significant network latency. To address both issues simultaneously, we propose a novel block propagation protocol, Erasure-Coded Compact Block (ECCB). It is motivated by and designed to exploit the significant transactional redundancy empirically observed in propagating blocks from six Ethereum nodes deployed across three continents. This redundancy refers to two key observations we made. First, most transactions in a propagating block (called hitting transactions) already exist in nodes' local transaction pools. Second, almost all of the remaining non-hitting transactions in the block (called missing transactions) are overlapping between neighboring nodes. Thus, rather than propagating all transactions within a propagating block, ECCB only propagates the much smaller-sized parity data that is erasure-code generated from these transactions. When receiving an ECCB block, a node combines the parity data with the dominant hitting transactions already existing in the local transaction pool to reconstruct the missing transactions, thus significantly compressing the propagating block. Meanwhile, recommunication is avoided by transmitting slightly more parity data than the predicted total size of all missing transactions, leveraging the high degree of overlap in missing transactions between neighboring nodes. Results from both simulation and prototyping experiments demonstrate the high efficacy of ECCB.
items.abstract_zh: 区块链是构建下一代可信网络的基石，但其可扩展性较差。通过区块压缩来加速区块链节点之间的区块传播是提高可扩展性的有效方法。然而，现有的块压缩技术由于压缩率低或重通信率高，会导致高传输延迟（对于给定的互联网带宽，与块大小成正比）或多轮互联网延迟（由地理分离主导），从而导致显着的网络延迟。为了同时解决这两个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的块传播协议：纠删码紧凑块（ECCB）。它的动机和设计目的是利用在部署在三大洲的六个以太坊节点传播区块时观察到的大量交易冗余。这种冗余是指我们所做的两个关键观察。首先，传播块中的大多数交易（称为命中交易）已经存在于节点的本地交易池中。其次，块中几乎所有剩余的非命中交易（称为丢失交易）在相邻节点之间都是重叠的。因此，ECCB 不是传播传播块内的所有事务，而是仅传播从这些事务生成的纠删码所生成的小得多的奇偶校验数据。当接收到 ECCB 块时，节点将奇偶校验数据与本地交易池中已存在的主要命中交易相结合，以重建丢失的交易，从而显着压缩传播块。同时，利用相邻节点之间丢失事务的高度重叠，通过传输比所有丢失事务的预测总大小稍多的奇偶校验数据来避免重新通信。模拟和原型实验的结果都证明了 ECCB 的高效能。

items.title: Lessons Learned from Incorporating Formal Methods in Huawei Cloud Reliability.
items.abstract:
Formal methods are increasingly adopted in systems where reliability and correctness are critical, enabled by improvements in tool usability, speed, and automation. This industrial experience report presents three projects at Huawei Cloud showcasing different trade-offs in investment and assurance levels. We applied probabilistic concurrency testing, model checking, and deductive verification to two foundational services in the database and networking domains: the K2 transactional key-value store and the Global Server Load Balancer (GSLB).

Our work discovered bugs across different system layers—from design to implementation—which led to enhanced reliability, protocol simplifications, improved understanding, and generally higher developer confidence.

To support practical adoption, we provide empirical and anecdotal data—including person-month effort metrics, tool comparisons, and success patterns—enabling engineering teams to make informed decisions about which approaches to invest in, when to apply lightweight versus heavyweight techniques, and how to budget for formal methods adoption in their organisation.
items.abstract_zh:
通过工具可用性、速度和自动化的改进，形式化方法越来越多地在可靠性和正确性至关重要的系统中采用。这份行业经验报告介绍了华为云的三个项目，展示了投资和保障水平的不同权衡。我们将概率并发测试、模型检查和演绎验证应用于数据库和网络领域的两个基础服务：K2 事务键值存储和全局服务器负载均衡器 (GSLB)。

我们的工作发现了不同系统层（从设计到实现）的错误，从而提高了可靠性、简化了协议、加深了理解，并普遍提高了开发人员的信心。

为了支持实际采用，我们提供经验和轶事数据（包括人月工作量指标、工具比较和成功模式），使工程团队能够就投资哪些方法、何时应用轻量级与重量级技术以及如何为组织中采用正式方法制定预算做出明智的决策。

items.title: SKernel: An Elastic and Efficient Secure Container System at Scale with a Split-Kernel Architecture.
items.abstract:
Secure containers leverage hardware virtualization to isolate container sandboxes, enabling dedicated guest kernels to mitigate shared kernel attacks prevalent in traditional systems. However, existing approaches struggle with a fundamental trade-off: VM-based solutions (e.g., Kata) prioritize performance but lack elasticity and on-demand usage for volatile and bursty workloads, while lightweight methods (e.g., gVisor) rely on the host kernel for dynamic resource management at the cost of significant performance degradation due to guest-host dependencies.

We present SKernel, a production-proven secure container system that resolves this trade-off through a novel split-kernel architecture. Observing I/O stacks dominate performance for cloud-native apps, SKernel decouples the guest kernel into two components: SKernel-R (resource management via host collaboration) and SKernel-D (high-performance I/O operations without host involvement). Key innovations of SKernel include (1) a fast syscall forwarding approach that minimizes context switch overheads; (2) a device passthrough-based network stack that offers improved compatibility and resource flexibility, combined with an advanced thread model and I/O notification mechanism to handle volatile and bursty workloads; (3) a file descriptor-based container filesystem that enhances security, eliminates unnecessary indirection, and reduces costs. Macrobenchmarks evaluations show SKernel achieves 4.49× throughput gains over gVisor while matching its elasticity. SKernel reduces CPU usage compared to runc under production workloads, supporting over 2,000 long-running microservices applications across 40,000+ nodes (with 100,000+ secure containers) at Ant Group. SKernel represents a milestone as a production-ready secure container that delivers both efficiency and elasticity.
items.abstract_zh:
安全容器利用硬件虚拟化来隔离容器沙箱，使专用来宾内核能够减轻传统系统中普遍存在的共享内核攻击。然而，现有的方法面临着一个基本的权衡：基于虚拟机的解决方案（例如 Kata）优先考虑性能，但缺乏对不稳定和突发工作负载的弹性和按需使用，而轻量级方法（例如 gVisor）依赖主机内核进行动态资源管理，但由于来宾主机依赖性而导致性能显着下降。

我们推出了 SKernel，这是一种经过生产验证的安全容器系统，它通过新颖的拆分内核架构解决了这种权衡问题。观察到 I/O 堆栈在云原生应用程序的性能中占主导地位，SKernel 将来宾内核解耦为两个组件：SKernel-R（通过主机协作进行资源管理）和 SKernel-D（无需主机参与的高性能 I/O 操作）。 SKernel 的主要创新包括 (1) 一种快速系统调用转发方法，可最大限度地减少上下文切换开销； (2) 基于设备直通的网络堆栈，提供改进的兼容性和资源灵活性，结合先进的线程模型和 I/O 通知机制来处理不稳定和突发的工作负载； (3) 基于文件描述符的容器文件系统，增强安全性，消除不必要的间接，并降低成本。 Macrobenchmarks 评估显示，SKernel 的吞吐量比 gVisor 提高了 4.49 倍，同时与其弹性相匹配。与生产工作负载下的 runc 相比，SKernel 降低了 CPU 使用率，支持 Ant Group 跨 40,000 多个节点（包含 100,000 多个安全容器）的 2,000 多个长时间运行的微服务应用程序。 SKernel 作为一个可立即投入生产的安全容器，具有里程碑意义，可同时提供效率和弹性。

items.title: Zeppelin: Balancing Variable-length Workloads in Data Parallel Large Model Training.
items.abstract:
Training large language models (LLMs) with increasingly long and varying sequence lengths introduces severe load imbalance challenges in large-scale data-parallel training. Recent frameworks attempt to mitigate these issues through data reorganization or hybrid parallel strategies. However, they often overlook how computational and communication costs scale with sequence length, resulting in suboptimal performance. We identify three critical challenges: (1) varying computation-to-communication ratios across sequences of different lengths in distributed attention, (2) mismatch between static NIC-GPU affinity and dynamic parallel workloads, and (3) distinct optimal partitioning strategies required for quadratic attention versus linear components.

To address these challenges, we present Zeppelin , a novel training system that integrates three key techniques: (1) a hierarchical sequence partitioning method for the attention module that reduces communication overhead and balances computation, supported by an efficient attention engine that applies divergent parallel strategies; (2) a routing layer that orchestrates inter-node transfers to fully utilize NIC bandwidth; and (3) a remapping layer that transforms sequence layouts between attention and linear modules, ensuring high computational efficiency across both. Comprehensive evaluations across diverse configurations show that Zeppelin delivers an average 2.80× speedup over state-of-the-art methods.
items.abstract_zh:
训练具有越来越长且变化的序列长度的大型语言模型（LLM）会在大规模数据并行训练中带来严重的负载不平衡挑战。最近的框架试图通过数据重组或混合并行策略来缓解这些问题。然而，他们经常忽视计算和通信成本如何随着序列长度而变化，从而导致性能不佳。我们确定了三个关键挑战：(1) 分布式注意力中不同长度的序列之间的计算与通信比率不同；(2) 静态 NIC-GPU 关联性和动态并行工作负载之间的不匹配；(3) 二次注意力与线性组件所需的不同的最佳划分策略。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 Zeppelin，一种新颖的训练系统，它集成了三种关键技术：（1）注意力模块的分层序列划分方法，减少通信开销并平衡计算，并由应用发散并行策略的高效注意力引擎支持； (2) 路由层，协调节点间传输以充分利用 NIC 带宽； （3）重新映射层，用于在注意力模块和线性模块之间转换序列布局，确保两者的高计算效率。对不同配置的综合评估表明，Zeppelin 的速度比最先进的方法平均提高了 2.80 倍。

items.title: TokenFlow: Responsive LLM Text Streaming Serving under Request Burst via Preemptive Scheduling.
items.abstract: Real-time LLM interactions demand streamed token generations , where text tokens are progressively generated and delivered to users while balancing two objectives: responsiveness (i.e., low time-to-first-token) and steady generation (i.e., required time-between-tokens). Standard LLM serving systems suffer from the inflexibility caused by non-preemptive request scheduling and reactive memory management, leading to poor resource utilization and low request processing parallelism under request bursts. Therefore, we present TokenFlow, a novel LLM serving system with enhanced text streaming performance via preemptive request scheduling and proactive key-value (KV) cache management. TokenFlow dynamically prioritizes requests based on real-time token buffer occupancy and token consumption rate, while actively transferring KV cache between GPU and CPU memory in the background and overlapping I/O with computation to minimize request preemption overhead. Extensive experiments on Llama3-8B and Qwen2.5-32B across multiple GPUs (RTX 4090, A6000, H200) demonstrate that TokenFlow achieves up to 82.5% higher effective throughput (accounting for actual user consumption) while reducing P99 TTFT by up to 80.2%, without degrading overall token throughput.
items.abstract_zh: 实时 LLM 交互需要流式令牌生成，其中文本令牌逐步生成并交付给用户，同时平衡两个目标：响应性（即，首次令牌时间短）和稳定生成（即，令牌之间所需的时间）。标准的LLM服务系统受到非抢占式请求调度和反应式内存管理造成的不灵活性的影响，导致资源利用率低、请求突发时请求处理并行性低。因此，我们提出了 TokenFlow，这是一种新颖的 LLM 服务系统，通过抢占式请求调度和主动键值 (KV) 缓存管理来增强文本流性能。 TokenFlow 根据实时令牌缓冲区占用情况和令牌消耗率动态对请求进行优先级排序，同时在后台主动在 GPU 和 CPU 内存之间转移 KV 缓存，并使 I/O 与计算重叠，以最大程度地减少请求抢占开销。在 Llama3-8B 和 Qwen2.5-32B 上跨多个 GPU（RTX 4090、A6000、H200）进行的广泛实验表明，TokenFlow 的有效吞吐量提高了 82.5%（考虑到实际用户消耗），同时将 P99 TTFT 减少了 80.2%，而不会降低总体令牌吞吐量。

items.title: High Throughput and Low Latency LLM Serving via Adaptive KV Caching.
items.abstract:
The substantial memory demands of model weights and key-value (KV) caches often lead to severe memory bottlenecks in LLM serving. Existing systems address this by offloading KV caches to host memory and rapidly restoring them on demand before decoding. However, these approaches are too coarse-grained and fail to fully exploit the combined computational and storage capabilities of GPUs.

In this paper, we introduce eLLM, a novel LLM serving system designed to achieve high throughput and low latency through fine-grained KV caching. The core innovation lies in adaptively storing partial tokens with KV caches while dynamically recomputing non-cached tokens in parallel with decoding, thereby balancing memory usage and computational efficiency. This new mechanism enables dual-level optimizations: At the request level, eLLM employs token-wise caching to adaptively adjust batch sizes and uncached token ratios in real time. At the layer level, eLLM leverages communication-computation overlap and kernel fusion for resource-complementary operations to further enhance throughput and reduce latency. Experiments demonstrate that eLLM achieves 3.03x higher throughput while satisfying strict per-output-token latency SLOs. It also reduces first-token latency by 2.63x compared to state-of-the-art systems.
items.abstract_zh:
模型权重和键值 (KV) 缓存的大量内存需求通常会导致 LLM 服务中出现严重的内存瓶颈。现有系统通过将 KV 缓存卸载到主机内存并在解码前根据需要快速恢复它们来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法过于粗粒度，无法充分利用 GPU 的计算和存储能力。

在本文中，我们介绍了 eLLM，这是一种新颖的 LLM 服务系统，旨在通过细粒度 KV 缓存实现高吞吐量和低延迟。核心创新在于利用 KV 缓存自适应存储部分 token，同时在解码的同时动态重新计算非缓存 token，从而平衡内存使用和计算效率。这种新机制实现了双层优化：在请求级别，eLLM 采用 token-wise 缓存来自适应地实时调整批量大小和未缓存的 token 比率。在层层面，eLLM 利用通信计算重叠和内核融合进行资源互补操作，以进一步提高吞吐量并减少延迟。实验表明，eLLM 的吞吐量提高了 3.03 倍，同时满足严格的每个输出令牌延迟 SLO。与最先进的系统相比，它还将第一个令牌延迟缩短了 2.63 倍。

items.title: Fast and Parallelized Crash Consistency with Opportunistic Order Elimination.
items.abstract:
File systems rely on enforcing storage order for crash recovery. However, this ordering requirement limits I/O parallelism, especially in persistent memory (PM) file systems where ordered I/Os are synchronized for direct access, preventing file systems from fully exploiting PM I/O parallelism.

This paper proposes a new I/O mechanism, called opportunistic order elimination , to achieve fast and parallelized crash consistency in PM file systems. The key idea is to eliminate the order between user data and file system metadata via fast checksums, and overlap checksum computation and metadata I/O with parallel data writes, thereby fully exploiting the parallelism of PM. An array of techniques are further introduced to control, dispatch, and recover parallelized I/O for efficiency, concurrency, and reliability. Based on this, we build ChimeraFS atop Linux kernel. A range of benchmarks and applications suggest that ChimeraFS achieves reliable crash recovery, significantly outperforms state-of-the-art PM file systems (e.g., OdinFS), and potentially approaches the ideal parallel write bandwidth of PM.
items.abstract_zh:
文件系统依靠强制执行存储顺序来进行崩溃恢复。然而，这种排序要求限制了 I/O 并行性，尤其是在持久内存 (PM) 文件系统中，其中有序 I/O 被同步以进行直接访问，从而阻止文件系统充分利用 PM I/O 并行性。

本文提出了一种新的 I/O 机制，称为机会顺序消除，以在 PM 文件系统中实现快速且并行的崩溃一致性。其关键思想是通过快速校验消除用户数据和文件系统元数据之间的顺序，并将校验和计算和元数据I/O与并行数据写入重叠，从而充分利用PM的并行性。进一步引入了一系列技术来控制、调度和恢复并行 I/O，以提高效率、并发性和可靠性。在此基础上，我们在 Linux 内核之上构建了 ChimeraFS。一系列基准测试和应用表明 ChimeraFS 实现了可靠的崩溃恢复，显着优于最先进的 PM 文件系统（例如 OdinFS），并有可能接近 PM 的理想并行写入带宽。

items.title: Federated Fine-Tuning of Sparsely-Activated Large Language Models on Resource-Constrained Devices.
items.abstract: Federated fine-tuning of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)-based large language models (LLMs) is challenging due to their massive computational requirements and the resource constraints of participants. Existing works attempt to fill this gap through model quantization, computation offloading, or expert pruning. However, they cannot achieve desired performance due to impractical system assumptions and a lack of consideration for MoE-specific characteristics. In this paper, we propose Flux, a system designed to enable federated fine-tuning of MoE-based LLMs across participants with constrained computing resources (e.g., consumer-grade GPUs), aiming to minimize time-to-accuracy. Flux introduces three key innovations: (1) quantization-based local profiling to estimate expert activation with minimal overhead, (2) adaptive layer-aware expert merging to reduce resource consumption while preserving accuracy, and (3) dynamic expert role assignment using an exploration-exploitation strategy to balance tuning and non-tuning experts. Extensive experiments on LLaMA-MoE and DeepSeek-MoE with multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that Flux significantly outperforms existing methods, achieving up to 4.75× speedup in time-to-accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 由于大量的计算需求和参与者的资源限制，基于专家混合 (MoE) 的大型语言模型 (LLM) 的联合微调具有挑战性。现有的工作试图通过模型量化、计算卸载或专家剪枝来填补这一空白。然而，由于不切实际的系统假设以及缺乏对 MoE 特定特征的考虑，它们无法实现预期的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 Flux，这是一个旨在使计算资源有限（例如消费级 GPU）的参与者能够对基于 MoE 的 LLM 进行联合微调的系统，旨在最大限度地缩短获得准确的时间。 Flux 引入了三项关键创新：(1) 基于量化的本地分析，以最小的开销估计专家激活，(2) 自适应分层感知专家合并，以减少资源消耗，同时保持准确性，以及 (3) 使用探索-利用策略的动态专家角色分配，以平衡调整和非调整专家。在 LLaMA-MoE 和 DeepSeek-MoE 上使用多个基准数据集进行的大量实验表明，Flux 的性能显着优于现有方法，在准确时间方面实现了高达 4.75 倍的加速。

items.title: Scheduling Cloud Block Storage Proactively and Reactively with Omar.
items.abstract: We explore the performance improvements for a production Elastic Block Storage (EBS) service at Alibaba, which serves millions of users and virtual disks daily. Despite various load balancing measures, Alibaba EBS still faces frequent performance variations or even occasional Service Level Objective (SLO) violations. Our trace analysis reveals that the existing scheduling mechanism in Alibaba EBS, which adopts a common practice of focusing on load balancing alone, is insufficient for mitigating tail latency due to negligence of correlated I/O workloads, reliance on fixed scheduling frequencies, and insufficient input metrics for scheduling decisions. We present Omar, a novel hybrid proactive and reactive scheduling framework that enables dynamic, finegrained scheduling. Evaluation on production-scale testbeds shows that Omar reduces 64 KiB tail latency by up to 52.2% and the number of scheduling operations by 44.6% compared to the baseline scheduler, while incurring limited overhead.
items.abstract_zh: 我们探讨了阿里巴巴生产弹性块存储 (EBS) 服务的性能改进，该服务每天为数百万用户和虚拟磁盘提供服务。尽管采取了各种负载均衡措施，阿里巴巴 EBS 仍然面临频繁的性能变化，甚至偶尔违反服务级别目标 (SLO)。我们的跟踪分析表明，阿里巴巴 EBS 中现有的调度机制采用了仅关注负载均衡的常见做法，由于忽视了相关 I/O 工作负载、依赖固定的调度频率以及调度决策的输入指标不足，不足以缓解尾部延迟。我们推出了 Omar，一种新颖的混合主动式和反应式调度框架，可实现动态、细粒度的调度。对生产规模测试床的评估表明，与基线调度器相比，Omar 将 64 KiB 尾部延迟减少了高达 52.2%，调度操作数量减少了 44.6%，同时产生的开销有限。

items.title: SmartNS: Enabling Line-rate and Flexible Network Stack with SmartNIC.
items.abstract: As the gap between network and CPU speeds rapidly increases, the CPU-centric network stack proves inadequate due to excessive CPU and memory overheads. Though hardware-offloaded network stacks alleviate these issues, they suffer from limited flexibility in both control and data planes. It seems promising to offload network stacks to Smart-NICs to provide high flexibility. However, naive offloading leads to low throughput due to the inherent architectural limitations of widespread off-path SmartNICs. Even simple operations on staged network traffic would overwhelm the limited SmartNIC memory bandwidth. To this end, we design SmartNS, a SmartNIC-centric network stack with software transport programmability and line-rate packet processing capabilities. To tackle the limitations of SmartNIC-induced challenges, we propose a header-only offloading TX path and an unlimited-working-set in-cache processing RX path to minimize memory traffic to fit the wimpy SmartNIC memory bandwidth. To fully utilize the SmartNIC computing resources, we propose a programmable offloading engine to enable cloud providers to offload customized tasks along with the network stack processing. We prototype SmartNS using the widespread Nvidia BlueField-3 SmartNIC, and implement RoCEv2 and Solar transport protocols by leveraging SmartNS's software programmability. SmartNS achieves 2.2× higher throughput than the microkernel-based baseline in block storage disaggregation and 1.3× higher throughput than the hardware-offloaded baseline in KVCache transfer.
items.abstract_zh: 随着网络和 CPU 速度之间的差距迅速拉大，以 CPU 为中心的网络堆栈由于 CPU 和内存开销过多而被证明是不够的。尽管硬件卸载网络堆栈缓解了这些问题，但它们在控制平面和数据平面方面的灵活性都有限。将网络堆栈卸载到智能网卡以提供高度灵活性似乎很有希望。然而，由于广泛使用的路径外 SmartNIC 的固有架构限制，简单卸载会导致吞吐量低。即使是对分阶段网络流量进行简单的操作也会压垮有限的 SmartNIC 内存带宽。为此，我们设计了SmartNS，一个以SmartNIC为中心的网络堆栈，具有软件传输可编程性和线速数据包处理能力。为了解决 SmartNIC 带来的挑战的局限性，我们提出了仅标头卸载 TX 路径和无限工作集缓存内处理 RX 路径，以最大限度地减少内存流量，以适应​​微弱的 SmartNIC 内存带宽。为了充分利用 SmartNIC 计算资源，我们提出了一个可编程卸载引擎，使云提供商能够卸载自定义任务以及网络堆栈处理。我们使用广泛使用的 Nvidia BlueField-3 SmartNIC 制作 SmartNS 原型，并利用 SmartNS 的软件可编程性实现 RoCEv2 和 Solar 传输协议。 SmartNS 在块存储分解方面的吞吐量比基于微内核的基准高 2.2 倍，在 KVCache 传输方面比硬件卸载基准高 1.3 倍。

items.title: KUNSERVE: Parameter-centric Memory Management for Efficient Memory Overloading Handling in LLM Serving.
items.abstract:
Serving LLMs with a cluster of GPUs is common nowadays, where the serving system must meet strict latency SLOs required by applications. However, the stateful nature of LLM serving requires maintaining huge states (i.e., KVCache) in limited GPU memory. Under spikes in real-world workloads, GPU memory can be easily overloaded, leading to orders of magnitude higher response latency due to queuing introduced by waiting for KVCache to be reclaimed. Prior KVCachecentric approaches handle overloading by dropping, migrating, or swapping KVCache. These methods fail to release sufficient memory quickly with requests still queued.

This paper proposes the first parameter-centric approach to handling overloading by selectively dropping replicated parameters to instantly free memory for requests, based on an unnoticed observation that model parameters are commonly replicated across GPUs for serving LLMs. With additional memory, all requests can be served with a larger batch without queuing. To make the parameter-centric approach correct and efficient, we cooperatively execute requests on GPUs with a complete copy of parameters using pipeline parallelism, and derive an appropriate drop plan without unnecessary cooperation. We also design techniques to minimize the performance overhead due to pipeline parallelism with the execution patterns of requests under drop. Evaluations show that Kun-Serve reduces the tail TTFT of requests under overloading by up to 72.2 × compared to the state-of-the-art systems including Llumnix, vLLM and InferCept.
items.abstract_zh:
如今，使用 GPU 集群为法学硕士提供服务很常见，其中服务系统必须满足应用程序所需的严格延迟 SLO。然而，LLM 服务的有状态特性需要在有限的 GPU 内存中维护巨大的状态（即 KVCache）。在现实工作负载高峰的情况下，GPU 内存很容易过载，由于等待 KVCache 回收而引入队列，从而导致响应延迟增加几个数量级。先前以 KVCache 为中心的方法通过删除、迁移或交换 KVCache 来处理过载。这些方法无法快速释放足够的内存，且请求仍在排队。

本文提出了第一个以参数为中心的方法来处理过载，通过有选择地删除复制的参数来立即释放请求的内存，这是基于一个未被注意到的观察结果，即模型参数通常跨 GPU 复制以服务 LLM。有了额外的内存，所有请求都可以以更大的批次得到满足，而无需排队。为了使以参数为中心的方法正确且高效，我们使用管道并行性在 GPU 上协作执行具有完整参数副本的请求，并导出适当的丢弃计划，而无需不必要的合作。我们还设计了一些技术，以最大限度地减少由于管道并行性和丢弃请求的执行模式而导致的性能开销。评估表明，与 Llumnix、vLLM 和 InferCept 等最先进的系统相比，Kun-Serve 在过载情况下将请求的尾部 TTFT 减少了高达 72.2 倍。

items.title: PaCaR: Improved Buffered I/O Locality on NUMA Systems with Page Cache Replication.
items.abstract:
Modern systems featuring multiple sockets suffer from the non-uniformity of performance of their memory accesses. Accessing memory of a remote node can lead to doubled latencies and halved bandwidth. This is particularly critical for I/O-intensive applications relying on the Linux page cache, where locality is paramount. Existing solutions migrating threads or memory across nodes fail to address the issue with highly parallel workloads, where a small working set is constantly accessed by multiple threads across nodes.

We present PaCaR, a novel page cache replication mechanism that enhances locality by transparently replicating cached pages across Non-Uniform Memory Access (NUMA) nodes. PaCaR ensures write consistency, adapts to memory pressure, and operates seamlessly without requiring application modifications. Evaluations on a dual socket NUMA server demonstrate up to 1.4x performance improvements in synthetic workloads and up to 25% gains in real-world workloads, showcasing the effectiveness of PaCaR in optimizing NUMA-aware buffered I/O operations.
items.abstract_zh:
具有多个套接字的现代系统遭受内存访问性能不均匀的困扰。访问远程节点的内存可能会导致延迟加倍和带宽减半。这对于依赖 Linux 页面缓存的 I/O 密集型应用程序尤其重要，因为其中局部性至关重要。跨节点迁移线程或内存的现有解决方案无法解决高度并行工作负载的问题，其中一个小型工作集不断被跨节点的多个线程访问。

我们提出了 PaCaR，一种新颖的页面缓存复制机制，它通过跨非统一内存访问 (NUMA) 节点透明地复制缓存页面来增强局部性。 PaCaR 确保写入一致性、适应内存压力并无缝运行，无需修改应用程序。对双路 NUMA 服务器的评估显示，综合工作负载的性能提升高达 1.4 倍，实际工作负载的性能提升高达 25%，展示了 PaCaR 在优化 NUMA 感知缓冲 I/O 操作方面的有效性。

items.title: Fix: externalizing network I/O in serverless computing.
items.abstract: We describe a system for serverless computing where users, programs, and the underlying platform share a common representation of a computation: a deterministic procedure, run in an environment of well-specified data or the outputs of other computations. This representation externalizes I/O: data movement over the network is performed exclusively by the platform. Applications can describe the precise data needed at each stage, helping the provider schedule tasks and network transfers to reduce starvation. The design suggests an end-to-end argument for outsourced computing, shifting the service model from "pay-for-effort" to "pay-for-results."
items.abstract_zh: 我们描述了一个无服务器计算系统，其中用户、程序和底层平台共享计算的通用表示：确定性过程，在明确指定的数据或其他计算的输出的环境中运行。这种表示形式将 I/O 外部化：网络上的数据移动完全由平台执行。应用程序可以描述每个阶段所需的精确数据，帮助提供商安排任务和网络传输以减少饥饿。该设计提出了外包计算的端到端论点，将服务模式从“按工作量付费”转变为“按结果付费”。

items.title: PatternSketch: General and Runtime Reconfigurable Time-series Network Traffic Pattern Detection.
items.abstract: Network traffic measurement is indispensable for many network management tasks. Time-series traffic pattern detection extends the benefits of traditional single-period flow measurement by revealing dynamic flow behaviors, but also yields higher complexity. When multiple patterns must be monitored simultaneously, building a separate sketch for each pattern is prohibitive since programmable switches typically allow only one resource-intensive sketch. In this paper, we propose PatternSketch, which enables general and dynamically reconfigurable time-series pattern detection within a single sketch. PatternSketch unifies the detection of diverse patterns with a Pattern Automaton and decomposes the pattern detection process into two phases in the data plane, while allowing operators to reconfigure the active set of monitoring patterns at runtime without taking the switch offline. Our implementation on an Intel Tofino switch demonstrates that PatternSketch can operate at line rate, detecting multiple patterns concurrently while using only tens of kilobytes of SRAM. This significantly reduces both computational and storage resource consumption compared to deploying multiple, pattern-specific sketches. Evaluations on four real-world datasets show that the hardware version of PatternSketch maintains over 90% F1 scores while simultaneously detecting six time-series patterns (three representative and three newly proposed) with as little as 200KB of memory.
items.abstract_zh: 网络流量测量对于许多网络管理任务是不可或缺的。时间序列流量模式检测通过揭示动态流量行为扩展了传统单周期流量测量的优势，但也产生了更高的复杂性。当必须同时监控多个模式时，为每个模式构建单独的草图是令人望而却步的，因为可编程开关通常只允许一个资源密集型草图。在本文中，我们提出了 PatternSketch，它可以在单个草图中实现通用且动态可重新配置的时间序列模式检测。 PatternSketch 将不同模式的检测与模式自动机统一起来，并将模式检测过程分解为数据平面中的两个阶段，同时允许操作员在运行时重新配置活动的监视模式集，而无需使交换机离线。我们在 Intel Tofino 交换机上的实现表明，PatternSketch 可以线速运行，仅使用数十 KB 的 SRAM，即可同时检测多个模式。与部署多个特定于模式的草图相比，这显着减少了计算和存储资源消耗。对四个真实世界数据集的评估表明，PatternSketch 的硬件版本保持了超过 90% 的 F1 分数，同时检测六个时间序列模式（三个代表性的和三个新提出的），内存只有 200KB。

items.title: PiLLM: Resource-Efficient LLM Inference Using Workload Prediction.
items.abstract:
LLM inference demands substantial GPU resources, but its highly variable workload characteristics create efficiency challenges at both inter-GPU and intra-GPU levels. To meet Service Level Objectives (SLOs), existing systems typically overprovision resources in two ways: allocating excess GPUs to handle peak loads and reserving excessive memory per request to prevent out-of-memory during token generation. We introduce PiLLM (Predictable inference for LLMs), a system that addresses these inefficiencies through accurate workload prediction and dynamic resource allocation.

PiLLM's core lies in the statistical prediction algorithm that accurately models computational and memory requirements by analyzing input/output sequence lengths distribution and request patterns. This enables two complementary optimizations: (1) an elastic inter-GPU dispatch mechanism that dynamically scales GPUs based on workload forecasts, and (2) an intra-GPU scheduler that improves utilization but reduces eviction through precise memory allocation.

We implement PiLLM on top of the disaggregated prefill/decode paradigm for fine-grained GPU saving. Extensive evaluation on production workloads with load fluctuations demonstrates that PiLLM significantly improves resource efficiency without compromising SLOs. Our inter-GPU dispatch reduces average usage by 1.6- 3.1x while maintaining SLO compliance, and our intra-GPU scheduler achieves throughput improvements with negligible eviction rates (<0.1%).
items.abstract_zh:
LLM 推理需要大量 GPU 资源，但其高度可变的工作负载特征在 GPU 间和 GPU 内级别都带来了效率挑战。为了满足服务级别目标 (SLO)，现有系统通常通过两种方式过度配置资源：分配多余的 GPU 来处理峰值负载，并为每个请求保留过多的内存以防止令牌生成期间出现内存不足。我们引入了 PiLLM（LLM 的可预测推理），该系统通过准确的工作负载预测和动态资源分配来解决这些低效率问题。

PiLLM 的核心在于统计预测算法，该算法通过分析输入/输出序列长度分布和请求模式来准确模拟计算和内存需求。这实现了两种互补的优化：(1) 弹性 GPU 间调度机制，可根据工作负载预测动态扩展 GPU；(2) GPU 内调度程序，可提高利用率，但通过精确的内存分配减少驱逐。

我们在分解的预填充/解码范例之上实现了 PiLLM，以实现细粒度的 GPU 节省。对具有负载波动的生产工作负载的广泛评估表明，PiLLM 在不影响 SLO 的情况下显着提高了资源效率。我们的 GPU 间调度将平均使用率降低了 1.6-3.1 倍，同时保持了 SLO 合规性，并且我们的 GPU 内调度程序以可忽略不计的逐出率 (<0.1%) 实现了吞吐量改进。

items.title: CHARM: Chiplet Heterogeneity-Aware Runtime Mapping System.
items.abstract:
The growing disparity between CPU core counts and available memory bandwidth has intensified memory contention in servers. This particularly affects highly parallelizable applications, which must achieve efficient cache utilization to maintain performance as CPU core counts grow. Optimizing cache utilization, however, is complex for recent chiplet-based CPUs, whose partitioned L3 caches lead to varying latencies and bandwidths, even within a single NUMA domain. Classical NUMA optimizations and task scheduling fail to address the performance issues of chiplet-based CPUs.

We describe Chiplet Heterogeneity Aware Runtime Mapping (CHARM), a new runtime system designed for chiplet-based CPUs. CHARM combines chiplet-aware task scheduling heuristics, hardware-aware memory allocation, and fine-grained performance monitoring to optimize workload execution. It implements a lightweight concurrency model that combines user-level threading features, such as individual stacks, per-task scheduling, and state management, with coroutine-like behavior, allowing tasks to suspend and resume execution at defined points while efficiently managing task migration across chiplets. Our evaluation across diverse scenarios shows CHARM's effectiveness in optimizing the performance of memory-intensive parallel applications.
items.abstract_zh:
CPU 核心数量和可用内存带宽之间日益扩大的差距加剧了服务器中的内存争用。这尤其影响高度可并行化的应用程序，这些应用程序必须实现高效的缓存利用，以便随着 CPU 核心数量的增长保持性能。然而，对于最近基于小芯片的 CPU 来说，优化缓存利用率非常复杂，其分区的 L3 缓存会导致不同的延迟和带宽，即使在单个 NUMA 域内也是如此。经典的 NUMA 优化和任务调度无法解决基于 Chiplet 的 CPU 的性能问题。

我们描述了 Chiplet 异构感知运行时映射 (CHARM)，这是一种专为基于 Chiplet 的 CPU 设计的新运行时系统。 CHARM 结合了小芯片感知任务调度启发式、硬件感知内存分配和细粒度性能监控来优化工作负载执行。它实现了一种轻量级并发模型，将用户级线程功能（例如单独堆栈、每任务调度和状态管理）与类似协程的行为相结合，允许任务在定义点挂起和恢复执行，同时有效管理跨小芯片的任务迁移。我们对不同场景的评估显示了 CHARM 在优化内存密集型并行应用程序性能方面的有效性。

items.title: OptiLog: Assigning Roles in Byzantine Consensus.
items.abstract:
Byzantine Fault-Tolerant (BFT) protocols play an important role in blockchains. As the deployment of such systems extends to wide-area networks, the scalability of BFT protocols becomes a critical concern. Optimizations that assign specific roles to individual replicas can significantly improve the performance of BFT systems. However, such role assignment is highly sensitive to faults, potentially undermining the optimizations' effectiveness.

To address these challenges, we present OptiLog, a logging framework for collecting and analyzing measurements that help to assign roles in globally distributed systems, despite the presence of faults. OptiLog presents local measurements in global data structures, to enable consistent decisions and hold replicas accountable if they do not perform according to their reported measurements.

We demonstrate OptiLog's flexibility by applying it to two BFT protocols: (1) Aware, a highly optimized PBFT-like protocol, and (2) Kauri, a tree-based protocol designed for large-scale deployments. OptiLog detects and excludes replicas that misbehave during consensus and thus enables the system to operate in an optimized, low-latency configuration, even under adverse conditions. Experiments show that for tree overlays deployed across 73 worldwide cities, trees found by OptiLog display 39% lower latency than Kauri.
items.abstract_zh:
拜占庭容错（BFT）协议在区块链中发挥着重要作用。随着此类系统的部署扩展到广域网，BFT 协议的可扩展性成为一个关键问题。将特定角色分配给各个副本的优化可以显着提高 BFT 系统的性能。然而，这种角色分配对错误高度敏感，可能会破坏优化的有效性。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 OptiLog，这是一个用于收集和分析测量结果的日志框架，尽管存在故障，但仍有助于在全球分布式系统中分配角色。 OptiLog 在全局数据结构中呈现本地测量结果，以实现一致的决策，并在副本未按照其报告的测量结果执行时追究其责任。

我们通过将 OptiLog 应用于两个 BFT 协议来展示 OptiLog 的灵活性：(1) Aware，一种高度优化的类 PBFT 协议，以及 (2) Kauri，一种专为大规模部署而设计的基于树的协议。 OptiLog 检测并排除在共识期间行为不当的副本，从而使系统即使在不利条件下也能以优化的低延迟配置运行。实验表明，对于在全球 73 个城市部署的树木覆盖，OptiLog 发现的树木显示延迟比贝壳杉低 39%。

items.title: MesaFS: An I/O-Efficient Metadata Service for Distributed File Systems.
items.abstract:
Distributed file systems typically rely on an underlying storage backend, called a metadata store , to support metadata updates. Previous work focuses on efficient directory tree management, bridging the performance gap between metadata updates and metadata stores. However, there is still a huge performance gap between metadata updates and SSD performance. This gap is mainly caused by extra SSD writes from two sources. First, a single high-level operation often translates to multiple writes in the metadata store (called a divided update ). Ensuring crash consistency for a divided update requires extra writes (e.g., journaling). Second, extra writes are required to maintain the physical order of metadata objects on the SSD (called layout ordering ), which is necessary to support operations like directory listing.

We propose MesaFS, an I/O-efficient metadata service for distributed file systems. MesaFS supports most metadata updates with a single SSD write. To achieve this, first, we propose invariant-aware ordered updates. Instead of enforcing atomicity for each divided update, it allows a divided update to be partially completed by ensuring directory invariants are satisfied eventually or can be restored during crash recovery, thus avoiding extra SSD writes. Second, we design a semi-ordered metadata layout to reduce the extra writes caused by maintaining a total order for metadata objects. Our evaluation shows that MesaFS achieves 62.0%-95.1% of raw SSD performance, compared to 8.4%-37.2% in our emulation of the state-of-the-art InfiniFS.
items.abstract_zh:
分布式文件系统通常依赖于称为元数据存储的底层存储后端来支持元数据更新。以前的工作重点是有效的目录树管理，缩小元数据更新和元数据存储之间的性能差距。然而，元数据更新和SSD性能之间仍然存在巨大的性能差距。这一差距主要是由两个来源的额外 SSD 写入造成的。首先，单个高级操作通常会转换为元数据存储中的多次写入（称为分割更新）。确保分割更新的崩溃一致性需要额外的写入（例如日志记录）。其次，需要额外的写入来维护 SSD 上元数据对象的物理顺序（称为布局排序），这是支持目录列表等操作所必需的。

我们提出了 MesaFS，一种用于分布式文件系统的 I/O 高效元数据服务。 MesaFS 通过单次 SSD 写入支持大多数元数据更新。为了实现这一目标，首先，我们提出不变感知有序更新。它不是对每个划分的更新强制执行原子性，而是通过确保最终满足目录不变量或可以在崩溃恢复期间恢复来允许划分的更新部分完成，从而避免额外的 SSD 写入。其次，我们设计了半有序元数据布局，以减少因维护元数据对象的总顺序而导致的额外写入。我们的评估显示，MesaFS 实现了原始 SSD 性能的 62.0%-95.1%，而我们对最先进的 InfiniFS 的模拟中仅为 8.4%-37.2%。

items.title: Proteus: Heterogeneous FPGA Virtualization.
items.abstract:
Cloud providers have widely adopted FPGAs to meet the high-performance, energy-efficient demands of cloud workloads. While they offer homogeneous FPGAs per service, recent FPGA products exhibit increasing heterogeneity in terms of vendors, capacity, off-chip memory, and performance. These diverse properties not only render applications incompatible across different FPGAs but also lead to performance disparities and resource inefficiency.

To fill these gaps, we propose Proteus, a heterogeneous FPGA virtualization framework. Proteus allows applications to manage diverse FPGAs transparently by abstracting their properties with four key contributions: an FPGA virtualization stack to abstract different FPGA stacks from applications, a platform-agnostic API to manage FPGAs regardless of their vendors/architectures, memory virtualization to optimize memory allocation depending on the off-chip memory type, and a performance-aware scheduler to deploy applications on the best-suited FPGAs based on their predicted performance.

We implement Proteus for cross-vendor FPGAs: AMD (U50, U280) and Intel (Stratix 10). Our evaluation highlights that Proteus makes applications deployable on any FPGA with 4.9–6.8% overheads for AMD FPGAs, and the performance-aware scheduler yields 13.8% throughput gain on average.
items.abstract_zh:
云提供商已广泛采用 FPGA 来满足云工作负载的高性能、高能效需求。虽然它们为每种服务提供同质 FPGA，但最近的 FPGA 产品在供应商、容量、片外存储器和性能方面表现出越来越多的异质性。这些不同的属性不仅导致不同 FPGA 之间的应用程序不兼容，还会导致性能差异和资源效率低下。

为了填补这些空白，我们提出了 Proteus，一种异构 FPGA 虚拟化框架。 Proteus 允许应用程序通过四个关键贡献抽象其属性来透明地管理不同的 FPGA：FPGA 虚拟化堆栈，用于从应用程序中抽象出不同的 FPGA 堆栈；与平台无关的 API，用于管理 FPGA（无论其供应商/架构如何）；内存虚拟化，用于根据片外内存类型优化内存分配；以及性能感知调度程序，用于根据预测性能在最适合的 FPGA 上部署应用程序。

我们为跨供应商 FPGA 实施 Proteus：AMD（U50、U280）和 Intel（Stratix 10）。我们的评估强调，Proteus 使应用程序可以部署在任何 FPGA 上，AMD FPGA 的开销为 4.9-6.8%，并且性能感知调度程序平均产生 13.8% 的吞吐量增益。

items.title: Accurate and Ultra-Fast Launch-Time Validation of Idempotency for GPU Kernels.
items.abstract: We discovered that a GPU kernel can have both idempotent and non-idempotent instances depending on the input. These kernels, called conditionally-idempotent , are common in real-world GPU applications—490 out of 547 from six popular applications. This finding reveals a limitation in previous work that statically classifies GPU kernels as idempotent or non-idempotent, potentially compromising the correctness and effectiveness of idempotence-based systems. This paper presents Picker, the first launch-time analysis system for instance-level idempotency validation. Picker accurately validates the idempotency of GPU kernel instances before execution by utilizing launch arguments. Several optimizations are proposed to reduce validation latency to microseconds. Evaluations using representative GPU applications (547 kernels and 18,217 instances) show that Picker accurately identifies idempotent instances with zero false positives and an 18.54% false-negative rate. The launch-time validation completes in under 5 μs for all instances (about 90% under 1 μs). Through integration, Picker reduces checkpoint costs to less than 4% in fault-tolerant systems and decreases preemption latency by 84.2% in scheduling systems.
items.abstract_zh: 我们发现 GPU 内核可以根据输入同时具有幂等和非幂等实例。这些称为“条件幂等”的内核在现实世界的 GPU 应用程序中很常见——来自 6 个流行应用程序的 547 个内核中有 490 个内核。这一发现揭示了之前工作中的一个局限性，即将 GPU 内核静态分类为幂等或非幂等，可能会损害基于幂等系统的正确性和有效性。本文介绍了 Picker，这是第一个用于实例级幂等性验证的启动时分析系统。 Picker 在执行之前利用启动参数准确验证 GPU 内核实例的幂等性。提出了几种优化来将验证延迟减少到微秒。使用代表性 GPU 应用程序（547 个内核和 18,217 个实例）进行的评估表明，Picker 能够准确识别幂等实例，误报率为 0，误报率为 18.54%。所有实例的启动时间验证均在 5 μs 内完成（约 90% 在 1 μs 内完成）。通过集成，Picker 在容错系统中将检查点成本降低到 4% 以下，在调度系统中将抢占延迟降低 84.2%。

items.title: Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute with Mobile NPU on Smartphones.
items.abstract: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) on mobile devices faces the challenge of insufficient performance in smaller models and excessive resource consumption in larger ones. This paper highlights that mobile Neural Processing Units (NPUs) have underutilized computational resources, particularly their matrix multiplication units, during typical LLM inference. To leverage this wasted compute capacity, we propose applying parallel test-time scaling techniques on mobile NPUs to enhance the performance of smaller LLMs. However, this approach confronts inherent NPU challenges, including inadequate hardware support for fine-grained quantization and low efficiency in general-purpose computations. To overcome these, we introduce two key techniques: a hardware-aware tile quantization scheme that aligns group quantization with NPU memory access patterns, and efficient LUT-based replacements for complex operations such as Softmax and dequantization. We design and implement an end-to-end inference system that leverages the NPU's compute capability to support test-time scaling on Qualcomm Snapdragon platforms. Experiments show our approach brings significant speedups: up to 19.0× for mixed-precision GEMM and 2.2× for Softmax. More importantly, we demonstrate that smaller models using test-time scaling can match or exceed the accuracy of larger models, achieving a new performance-cost Pareto frontier.
items.abstract_zh: 在移动设备上部署大型语言模型 (LLM) 面临着较小模型性能不足和较大模型资源消耗过多的挑战。本文强调，在典型的 LLM 推理过程中，移动神经处理单元 (NPU) 的计算资源未得到充分利用，特别是其矩阵乘法单元。为了利用这种浪费的计算能力，我们建议在移动 NPU 上应用并行测试时间扩展技术，以增强较小的 LLM 的性能。然而，这种方法面临着 NPU 固有的挑战，包括对细粒度量化的硬件支持不足以及通用计算效率低下。为了克服这些问题，我们引入了两项关键技术：将组量化与 NPU 内存访问模式对齐的硬件感知图块量化方案，以及针对 Softmax 和反量化等复杂操作的基于 LUT 的高效替换。我们设计并实现了一个端到端推理系统，该系统利用 NPU 的计算能力来支持 Qualcomm Snapdragon 平台上的测试时间扩展。实验表明，我们的方法带来了显着的加速：混合精度 GEMM 高达 19.0 倍，Softmax 高达 2.2 倍。更重要的是，我们证明使用测试时间缩放的较小模型可以匹配或超过较大模型的准确性，从而实现新的性能成本帕累托前沿。

items.title: Chimera: Transparent and High-Performance ISAX Heterogeneous Computing via Binary Rewriting.
items.abstract:
ISAX heterogeneous processors integrate cores that share a common base ISA, with certain cores offering extension ISAs (e.g., vector extension) to accelerate computation. ISAX balances performance and energy efficiency while facilitating the reuse of existing software ecosystems. RISC-V, which adopts the ISAX architecture, has gained extensive attention in both industry and academia. Binary translation via binary rewriting enables transparent ISAX heterogeneous computing by translating extension instructions when migrating a program to cores without extension support. However, current binary rewriting methods still struggle to achieve both high performance and correctness.

We propose Chimera, an ISAX heterogeneous computing system via binary rewriting that achieves both correctness and high performance. Prior binary rewriting methods ensure correctness by proactive fault checking, incurring unnecessary runtime overhead in normal executions unlikely to encounter faults. Chimera introduces a new binary rewriting method that passively triggers fault-handling only when faults actually occur, minimizing runtime overhead. We evaluated Chimera and notable ISAX heterogeneous computing systems using real-world workloads. In mixed matrix computational workloads, Chimera achieved only 3.2% performance overhead compared to native compilation, and only 5.3% in real-world workloads like Open-BLAS. On SPEC CPU2017 benchmarks, our method achieved up to 42.5% performance improvement over existing binary rewriting methods on average. Chimera's code is released on https://github.com/Eurosys26p57/Chimera.
items.abstract_zh:
ISAX 异构处理器集成了共享公共基础 ISA 的内核，某些内核提供扩展 ISA（例如矢量扩展）以加速计算。 ISAX 平衡性能和能源效率，同时促进现有软件生态系统的重用。采用ISAX架构的RISC-V得到了工业界和学术界的广泛关注。当将程序迁移到没有扩展支持的内核时，通过二进制重写进行的二进制翻译可通过翻译扩展指令来实现透明的 ISAX 异构计算。然而，当前的二进制重写方法仍然难以同时实现高性能和正确性。

我们提出了 Chimera，一种通过二进制重写实现正确性和高性能的 ISAX 异构计算系统。先前的二进制重写方法通过主动故障检查来确保正确性，在不太可能遇到故障的正常执行中产生不必要的运行时开销。 Chimera引入了一种新的二进制重写方法，仅在实际发生故障时被动触发故障处理，从而最大限度地减少运行时开销。我们使用实际工作负载评估了 Chimera 和著名的 ISAX 异构计算系统。在混合矩阵计算工作负载中，与本机编译相比，Chimera 仅实现了 3.2% 的性能开销，在 Open-BLAS 等实际工作负载中仅实现了 5.3% 的性能开销。在 SPEC CPU2017 基准测试中，我们的方法比现有的二进制重写方法平均性能提高了 42.5%。 Chimera 的代码发布在 https://github.com/Eurosys26p57/Chimera 上。

items.title: Avicenna: Masking Slowdowns in Replicated State Machines with Counterfactual Evaluation.
items.abstract:
Geo-distributed replicated state machines (RSMs) are at the heart of many production distributed systems, offering linearizability and fault tolerance via consensus protocols. Most existing protocols target crash fault tolerance, however, and are vulnerable to fail-slow faults, where a single slow replica can significantly degrade system latency. Existing protocols that tolerate fail-slow faults do so with much higher normal-case latency in geo-distributed settings.

This paper presents Avicenna, the first consensus protocol for geo-distributed RSMs that maintains low normal-case latency while tolerating a single fail-slow replica. Avicenna uses a single leader to order commands, naturally tolerating a fail-slow follower. To tolerate a fail-slow leader, Avicenna compares the current latency with the counterfactual latency clients would experience if a different replica, the shadow leader, were the leader. When that comparison indicates the current leader might be slow, Avicenna quickly promotes the shadow leader with a fast leader rotation protocol. Our evaluation shows Avicenna has the same normal-case latency as Multi-Paxos while tolerating fail-slow faults.
items.abstract_zh:
地理分布式复制状态机 (RSM) 是许多生产分布式系统的核心，通过共识协议提供线性化和容错性。然而，大多数现有协议都以崩溃容错为目标，并且容易受到慢速故障的影响，其中单个慢速副本可能会显着降低系统延迟。容忍慢速故障的现有协议在地理分布式设置中的正常情况延迟要高得多。

本文介绍了 Avicenna，这是第一个针对地理分布式 RSM 的共识协议，它在正常情况下保持较低的延迟，同时容忍单个故障缓慢副本。阿维森纳使用单个领导者来发出命令，自然地容忍失败缓慢的追随者。为了容忍失败缓慢的领导者，Avicenna 将当前延迟与如果不同的副本（影子领导者）是领导者时客户端将经历的反事实延迟进行比较。当比较表明当前领导者可能很慢时，阿维森纳会通过快速领导者轮换协议快速提升影子领导者。我们的评估表明，Avicenna 具有与 Multi-Paxos 相同的正常情况延迟，同时还能容忍失败慢故障。

items.title: A Logically Disaggregated Cache for Replicated Storage Systems.
items.abstract: We study if replicated storage systems effectively utilize the caches embedded within each replica. Our study reveals that existing systems manage the embedded caches in each replica in silos, leading to significant cache redundancy across replicas and consequently low performance. To address this problem, we introduce logically disaggregated cache (Ldc), a new approach to managing caches in replicated storage systems. Ldc disaggregates the embedded caches from the replicas to form a single, logical cache. Ldc then allows any replica to access any part of the logical cache, which reduces redundancy caused by reads. Because writes pollute all caches, Ldc quickly demotes written objects to limit redundancy caused by writes. Ldc, however, realizes that reducing redundancy may hurt performance in some cases and thus employs an online analyzer to strike a balance between cache redundancy and coverage. We implement Ldc in three systems: an eventually-consistent KV store, a strongly-consistent KV store, and a production database. Using microbenchmarks, macrobenchmarks, and real-world traces, we show that the Ldc versions perform significantly better than the original systems (e.g., 2.6× to 5.4× higher throughput in the eventually-consistent KV store under YCSB).
items.abstract_zh: 我们研究复制存储系统是否有效地利用每个副本中嵌入的缓存。我们的研究表明，现有系统在孤岛中管理每个副本中的嵌入式缓存，导致副本之间存在显着的缓存冗余，从而导致性能低下。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了逻辑分解缓存（Ldc），这是一种管理复制存储系统中缓存的新方法。 Ldc 将嵌入式缓存与副本分离，形成单个逻辑缓存。然后，LDC 允许任何副本访问逻辑缓存的任何部分，这减少了读取引起的冗余。由于写入会污染所有缓存，Ldc 会快速降级写入的对象，以限制写入造成的冗余。然而，LDC 意识到减少冗余在某些情况下可能会损害性能，因此采用在线分析器来在缓存冗余和覆盖范围之间取得平衡。我们在三个系统中实现 Ldc：最终一致的 KV 存储、强一致的 KV 存储和生产数据库。使用微基准、宏基准和真实世界跟踪，我们表明 Ldc 版本的性能明显优于原始系统（例如，YCSB 下最终一致的 KV 存储的吞吐量提高了 2.6 倍到 5.4 倍）。

items.title: Efficient Multimodal Serving via Module Multiplexing.
items.abstract: Multimodal learning enables models to process and reason over diverse information sources, unlocking human-like perceptual and cognitive capabilities. As such models gain adoption, efficiently serving them on GPUs has become increasingly important. However, the modular architecture of multimodal models poses significant challenges to existing unimodal serving systems, which treat models as monolithic and overlook inter-module heterogeneity. This results in severe GPU underutilization. To address this, we propose Eevee, a multimodal serving system based on a new scheduling paradigm we call module multiplexing. Unlike prior approaches that execute all modules sequentially with uniform batch sizes, Eevee schedules modality-specific modules concurrently on the same GPU with independently tuned batching and resource allocation. This design enables fine-grained GPU sharing, boosting intra-GPU parallelism and improving request-level throughput. We implement a prototype of Eevee and evaluate it on several representative multimodal models (e.g., CLIP, BLIP, LLaVA, InternVL). Our results show that Eevee significantly outperforms state-of-the-art serving systems in both throughput and GPU utilization.
items.abstract_zh: 多模态学习使模型能够处理和推理不同的信息源，释放类人的感知和认知能力。随着此类模型得到广泛采用，在 GPU 上高效地服务它们变得越来越重要。然而，多模态模型的模块化架构对现有的单模态服务系统提出了重大挑战，这些系统将模型视为整体并忽略了模块间的异构性。这会导致 GPU 严重利用率不足。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 Eevee，这是一种基于新的调度范例（我们称为模块复用）的多模式服务系统。与之前以统一批量大小顺序执行所有模块的方法不同，Eevee 在同一 GPU 上同时调度特定于模态的模块，并具有独立调整的批处理和资源分配。此设计可实现细粒度 GPU 共享，提高 GPU 内并行性并提高请求级吞吐量。我们实现了 Eevee 的原型，并在几个代表性的多模态模型（例如 CLIP、BLIP、LLaVA、InternVL）上对其进行了评估。我们的结果表明，Eevee 在吞吐量和 GPU 利用率方面均明显优于最先进的服务系统。

items.title: Efficient and Adaptable Overlapping for Computation and Communication via Signaling and Reordering.
items.abstract:
Generative models have achieved remarkable success across various applications, driving the demand for multi-GPU computing. Inter-GPU communication becomes a bottleneck in multi-GPU computing systems, particularly on consumer-grade GPUs. By exploiting concurrent hardware execution, overlapping computation and communication latency becomes an effective technique for mitigating the communication overhead. We identify that an efficient and adaptable overlapping design should satisfy (1) tile-wise overlapping to maximize the overlapping opportunity, (2) interference-free computation to maintain the original computational performance, and (3) communication agnosticism to reduce the development burden against varying communication primitives. Nevertheless, current designs fail to simultaneously optimize for all of those features.

To address the issue, we propose an overlapping design, named FlashOverlap , characterized by tile-wise overlapping, interference-free computation, and communication agnosticism. FlashOverlap utilizes a novel signaling mechanism: when part of the output finishes, the computation kernel sends a signal to trigger the communication of that part, while continuing the computation of the remaining part ( interference-free computation ). Consequently, the communication of the finished part and the computation of the remaining part can be overlapped. On top of the signaling mechanism, FlashOverlap comprises two key components: (1) the determination of the signaling timing to boost the overlap efficiency ( tile-wise overlapping ), and (2) a pre-communication reordering to create the contiguous address for finished data, enabling communication by simply calling NCCL [32] APIs ( communication agnosticism ), and a post-communication reordering to correct the data order. Experiments show that FlashOverlap achieves up to 1.65× speedup through overlap, outperforming existing works in most cases. Code is available at https://github.com/infinigence/FlashOverlap.
items.abstract_zh:
生成模型在各种应用中取得了显着的成功，推动了对多 GPU 计算的需求。 GPU 间通信成为多 GPU 计算系统中的瓶颈，特别是在消费级 GPU 上。通过利用并发硬件执行，重叠计算和通信延迟成为减轻通信开销的有效技术。我们认为，高效且适应性强的重叠设计应满足（1）分块重叠以最大化重叠机会，（2）无干扰计算以保持原始计算性能，以及（3）通信不可知论以减少针对不同通信原语的开发负担。然而，当前的设计无法同时优化所有这些功能。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种重叠设计，名为 FlashOverlap ，其特点是分块重叠、无干扰计算和通信不可知论。 FlashOverlap采用了一种新颖的信号机制：当部分输出完成时，计算内核发送信号来触发该部分的通信，同时继续剩余部分的计算（无干扰计算）。因此，已完成部分的通信和剩余部分的计算可以重叠。在信令机制之上，FlashOverlap 包含两个关键组件：（1）确定信令时序以提高重叠效率（分块重叠），以及（2）为完成的数据创建连续地址的通信前重新排序，通过简单地调用 NCCL [32] API 来实现通信（通信不可知论），以及纠正数据顺序的通信后重新排序。实验表明，FlashOverlap 通过重叠实现了高达 1.65 倍的加速，在大多数情况下优于现有的工作。代码可在 https://github.com/infinigence/FlashOverlap 获取。

items.title: LLMFolder: Revisiting Constant Folding in Large Language Models.
items.abstract:
Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities but face deployment challenges due to their massive parameter counts. While pruning can reduce model size, it leads to significant accuracy degradation under high compression ratios. We present a novel perspective inspired by constant folding in compiler optimization. Our approach enables parameter reduction by treating activation functions in LLMs as linear functions.

However, recent LLMs use complex non-linear activations like GELU that prevent direct application of this technique. We propose LLMFolder, which enables optimization of LLMs with non-linear activations by partially approximating them with linear functions in frequently occurring input ranges. For outlier inputs, LLMFolder employs an online predictor to dynamically fall back to original computations.

Our experiments demonstrate that LLMFolder achieves 80% parameter reduction in feed-forward networks, while significantly outperforming state-of-the-art pruning methods with up to 65% higher accuracy. When combined with quantization and pruning, LLMFolder can further achieve 92.5% parameter reduction with only 4.4% average accuracy drop for a 7B model, where neither technique alone or combination can achieve. In practical deployments for a 7B model, LLMFolder achieves 1.6× end-to-end inference speedup when integrated with the vLLM serving system, and 1.4× speedup with the widely adopted HuggingFace implementation, while incurring only a 10.9% accuracy trade-off.
items.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 展示了卓越的功能，但由于参数数量庞大而面临部署挑战。虽然剪枝可以减小模型大小，但在高压缩比下会导致精度显着下降。我们提出了一种受编译器优化中不断折叠启发的新颖视角。我们的方法通过将法学硕士中的激活函数视为线性函数来减少参数。

然而，最近的法学硕士使用复杂的非线性激活（如 GELU），阻碍了该技术的直接应用。我们提出了 LLMFolder，它可以通过在频繁出现的输入范围内用线性函数部分逼近非线性激活来优化 LLM。对于异常值输入，LLMFolder 使用在线预测器动态回退到原始计算。

我们的实验表明，LLMFolder 在前馈网络中实现了 80% 的参数减少，同时显着优于最先进的剪枝方法，准确度提高了 65%。当与量化和剪枝相结合时，LLMFolder 可以进一步实现 7B 模型参数减少 92.5%，平均准确率仅下降 4.4%，这是单独或组合技术都无法实现的。在 7B 模型的实际部署中，LLMFolder 在与 vLLM 服务系统集成时实现了 1.6 倍的端到端推理加速，在与广泛采用的 HuggingFace 实现相结合时实现了 1.4 倍的加速，同时仅产生 10.9% 的准确度折衷。

items.title: STAlloc: Enhancing Memory Efficiency in Large-Scale Model Training with Spatio-Temporal Planning.
items.abstract:
The rapid scaling of large language models (LLMs) has significantly increased GPU memory pressure, which is further aggravated by training optimization techniques such as virtual pipeline and recomputation that disrupt tensor lifespans and introduce considerable memory fragmentation. Such fragmentation stems from the use of online GPU memory allocators in popular deep learning frameworks like PyTorch, which disregard tensor lifespans. As a result, this inefficiency can waste as much as 43% of memory and trigger out-of-memory errors, undermining the effectiveness of optimization methods.

To address this, we introduce STAlloc, a GPU memory allocator for deep learning frameworks that reduces fragmentation by exploiting the spatial and temporal regularity in memory allocation behaviors of training workloads. STAlloc introduces a novel paradigm that combines offline planning with online allocation. The offline planning leverages spatio-temporal regularities to generate a near-optimal allocation plan, while the online allocation handles complex and dynamic models such as Mixture-of-Experts (MoE). Built as a pluggable PyTorch memory allocator, STAlloc reduces fragmentation ratio on average by 85.1% (up to 100%) across both dense and MoE models, with negligible overhead. This enables more efficient, high-throughput training configurations and improves throughput performance by up to 32.5%.
items.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 的快速扩展显着增加了 GPU 内存压力，而虚拟管道和重新计算等训练优化技术会破坏张量寿命并引入大量内存碎片，从而进一步加剧了这种压力。这种碎片源于 PyTorch 等流行深度学习框架中在线 GPU 内存分配器的使用，该框架不考虑张量的寿命。因此，这种低效率可能会浪费多达 43% 的内存并触发内存不足错误，从而破坏优化方法的有效性。

为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 STAlloc，这是一种用于深度学习框架的 GPU 内存分配器，它通过利用训练工作负载内存分配行为的空间和时间规律来减少碎片。 STAlloc 引入了一种新颖的范例，将离线规划与在线分配相结合。离线规划利用时空规律来生成接近最优的分配计划，而在线分配则处理复杂且动态的模型，例如专家混合（MoE）。 STAlloc 作为可插入的 PyTorch 内存分配器构建，在密集模型和 MoE 模型中平均将碎片率降低了 85.1%（高达 100%），而开销可以忽略不计。这可实现更高效、高吞吐量的训练配置，并将吞吐量性能提高高达 32.5%。

items.title: Everything You Need to Know About Virtual Machine Live Migration Between Heterogeneous Processors.
items.abstract: This paper focuses on the live migration of virtual machines (VMs) across semi-heterogeneous processors (SH), which share the same ISA but expose different features. Processor incompatibilities in such settings can block or break migrations, limiting resource utilization and operational flexibility. We provide the first detailed study of live migration feasibility across SH processors, yielding several findings valuable to cloud tenants, operators and hypervisor vendors. Building on these insights, we present MigCheck, a simulation tool that predicts the feasibility and outcome of VM migrations across SH processors without requiring costly real migrations. We demonstrate its accuracy and effectiveness through multiple use cases, including machine addition/removal, hypervisor updates, and VM platform adjustments.
items.abstract_zh: 本文重点关注虚拟机 (VM) 跨半异构处理器 (SH) 的实时迁移，这些处理器共享相同的 ISA，但公开不同的功能。此类设置中的处理器不兼容可能会阻止或中断迁移，从而限制资源利用率和操作灵活性。我们首次详细研究了跨 SH 处理器实时迁移的可行性，得出了一些对云租户、运营商和虚拟机管理程序供应商有价值的发现。基于这些见解，我们推出了 MigCheck，这是一种模拟工具，可以预测跨 SH 处理器的虚拟机迁移的可行性和结果，而无需进行昂贵的实际迁移。我们通过多个用例证明了其准确性和有效性，包括机器添加/删除、虚拟机管理程序更新和虚拟机平台调整。

items.title: NecoFuzz: Effective Fuzzing of Nested Virtualization via Fuzz-Harness Virtual Machines.
items.abstract:
Nested virtualization is now widely supported by major cloud vendors, allowing users to leverage virtualization-based technologies in the cloud. However, supporting nested virtualization significantly increases host hypervisor complexity and introduces a new attack surface in cloud platforms. While many prior studies have explored hypervisor fuzzing, none has explicitly addressed nested virtualization due to the challenge of generating effective virtual machine (VM) instances with a vast state space as fuzzing inputs.

We present NecoFuzz, the first fuzzing framework that systematically targets nested virtualization-specific logic in hypervisors. NecoFuzz synthesizes executable fuzz-harness VMs with internal states near the boundary between valid and invalid, guided by an approximate model of hardware-assisted virtualization specifications. Since vulnerabilities in nested virtualization often stem from incorrect handling of unexpected VM states, this specification-guided, boundary-oriented generation significantly improves coverage of security-critical code across different hypervisors.

We implemented NecoFuzz on Intel VT-x and AMD-V by extending AFL++ to support fuzz-harness VMs. Neco-Fuzz achieved 84.7% and 74.2% code coverage for nested virtualization-specific code on Intel VT-x and AMD-V, respectively, and uncovered six previously unknown vulnerabilities across three hypervisors, including two assigned CVEs.
items.abstract_zh:
嵌套虚拟化现已得到主要云供应商的广泛支持，允许用户在云中利用基于虚拟化的技术。然而，支持嵌套虚拟化显着增加了主机管理程序的复杂性，并在云平台中引入了新的攻击面。虽然许多先前的研究已经探索了虚拟机管理程序模糊测试，但由于生成具有巨大状态空间作为模糊测试输入的有效虚拟机 (VM) 实例的挑战，没有一个明确解决嵌套虚拟化问题。

我们推出了 NecoFuzz，这是第一个系统地针对虚拟机管理程序中嵌套虚拟化特定逻辑的模糊测试框架。 NecoFuzz 在硬件辅助虚拟化规范的近似模型的指导下，综合了可执行的模糊线束虚拟机，其内部状态接近有效和无效之间的边界。由于嵌套虚拟化中的漏洞通常源于对意外虚拟机状态的错误处理，因此这种以规范为导向、面向边界的生成方式显着提高了跨不同虚拟机管理程序的安全关键代码的覆盖率。

我们通过扩展 AFL++ 以支持模糊线束虚拟机，在 Intel VT-x 和 AMD-V 上实现了 NecoFuzz。 Neco-Fuzz 在 Intel VT-x 和 AMD-V 上的嵌套虚拟化特定代码分别实现了 84.7% 和 74.2% 的代码覆盖率，并发现了三个虚拟机管理程序中的 6 个以前未知的漏洞，包括两个分配的 CVE。

items.title: Untangling GPU Power Consumption: Job-Level Inference in Cloud Shared Settings.
items.abstract:
As the demand for AI-driven workloads increases, the energy consumption of Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) devices has come under intense scrutiny, particularly in hyperscale data centers where large numbers of accelerators are centralized and leased to diverse clients.

In the context of cloud hyperscalers, GPUs power monitoring presents several challenges that vary depending on the product offered. The monitoring capabilities of physical devices may be limited or even absent for some products. However, given the substantial energy demands of GPUs, power monitoring is essential for both cloud providers and clients. Operators require tools to manage power distribution effectively, such as balancing workloads across Power Distribution Units (PDUs), while clients need visibility into power usage to optimize their workloads for energy efficiency.

To address these challenges, we propose methods for estimating the energy consumption of jobs running on GPU devices in cloud environments, spanning from shared and managed offerings like ML-as-a-Service (MLaaS) to less managed products (e.g., Infrastructure-as-a-Service (IaaS)). Our models demonstrate the benefits of sharing GPUs for small AI workloads, as well as the current sub-optimal utilization of GPUs in cloud hyperscalers, based on insights from an IaaS GPU cluster.
items.abstract_zh:
随着人工智能驱动的工作负载需求的增加，图形处理单元 (GPU) 设备的能耗受到严格审查，特别是在超大规模数据中心，其中大量加速器集中并租给不同的客户。

在云超大规模企业的背景下，GPU 电源监控提出了一些挑战，这些挑战因所提供的产品而异。对于某些产品来说，物理设备的监控能力可能有限甚至不存在。然而，考虑到 GPU 的大量能源需求，电源监控对于云提供商和客户来说都至关重要。运营商需要工具来有效管理配电，例如平衡配电单元 (PDU) 之间的工作负载，而客户需要了解电力使用情况，以优化其工作负载以提高能源效率。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了估算云环境中 GPU 设备上运行作业的能耗的方法，涵盖从机器学习即服务 (MLaaS) 等共享和托管产品到托管较少的产品（例如基础设施即服务 (IaaS)）。基于 IaaS GPU 集群的见解，我们的模型展示了为小型 AI 工作负载共享 GPU 的好处，以及当前云超大规模中 GPU 的利用率不佳。

items.title: Crimson: Collaborative Parameter Updates for Efficient Pipeline Training of Large Language Models.
items.abstract:
Large language models (LLMs) have driven significant progress in natural language processing, yet their training and fine-tuning remain limited by memory constraints, particularly the substantial memory footprints of optimizer states. Existing solutions address this challenge by offloading optimizer states and update tasks to the CPU, but this often leads to increased GPU idleness due to the CPU's limited computational capabilities, especially in pipeline parallelism.

To address this, we present Crimson, an efficient system that optimizes parameter updates in pipeline parallelism. Crimson employs a collaborative parameter updates scheme that distributes each stage's updates across its local GPU and CPU as well as the GPUs of subsequent stages. In addition, we design a multi-stage collaborative optimizer to coordinate computations and communications, together with a trapezoid bubble aware scheduling that formulates the process as an optimization problem to determine the optimal parameter update strategy. This approach maximizes GPU computational and memory efficiency. Experimental results across diverse model scales, parallelism configurations and state-of-the-art pipeline schedulings demonstrate that Crimson achieves throughput improvements exceeding 1.35× with ZeRO-Offload and ZeRO-Offload++, and up to 1.33× with Recomputation, along with increased GPU utilization.
items.abstract_zh:
大型语言模型 (LLM) 推动了自然语言处理的重大进展，但它们的训练和微调仍然受到内存限制，特别是优化器状态的大量内存占用。现有的解决方案通过将优化器状态和更新任务卸载到 CPU 来解决这一挑战，但这通常会由于 CPU 的计算能力有限而导致 GPU 空闲率增加，尤其是在管道并行性方面。

为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 Crimson，这是一个高效的系统，可以优化管道并行性中的参数更新。 Crimson 采用协作参数更新方案，将每个阶段的更新分布到其本地 GPU 和 CPU 以及后续阶段的 GPU 上。此外，我们设计了一个多级协作优化器来协调计算和通信，以及梯形气泡感知调度，将过程制定为优化问题以确定最佳参数更新策略。这种方法最大限度地提高了 GPU 计算和内存效率。不同模型规模、并行配置和最先进的管道调度的实验结果表明，Crimson 通过 ZeRO-Offload 和 ZeRO-Offload++ 实现了超过 1.35 倍的吞吐量改进，通过重新计算实现了高达 1.33 倍的吞吐量改进，同时还提高了 GPU 利用率。

items.title: FlashPS: Efficient Generative Image Editing with Mask-aware Caching and Scheduling.
items.abstract: Generative image editing using diffusion models has become a prevalent application in today's AI cloud services. In production environments, image editing typically involves a mask that specifies the regions of an image template to be edited. The use of mask provides direct control over the editing process and introduces sparsity in the model inference. In this paper, we present FlashPS, a system that efficiently serves image editing requests. The key insight behind FlashPS is that image editing only modifies the masked regions of image templates, while preserving the original content in the unmasked areas. Driven by this insight, FlashPS judiciously skips redundant computations associated with the unmask areas by reusing cached intermediate activations from previous inferences. To mitigate the high cache loading overhead, FlashPS employs a bubble-free pipeline scheme that overlaps computation with cache loading. Additionally, to reduce queuing latency in online serving while improving the GPU utilization, FlashPS proposes a novel continuous batching strategy for diffusion model serving, allowing newly arrived requests to join the running batch in just one step of denoising computation, without waiting for the entire batch to complete. As heterogenous masks induce imbalanced load, FlashPS also develops a load balancing strategy that takes into account the loads of both computation and cache loading. Collectively, FlashPS outperforms state-of-the-art diffusion serving systems for image editing, achieving up to 3× higher throughput and reducing average request latency by up to 14.7× while ensuring image quality.
items.abstract_zh: 使用扩散模型的生成图像编辑已成为当今人工智能云服务中的普遍应用。在生产环境中，图像编辑通常涉及指定要编辑的图像模板区域的蒙版。掩码的使用提供了对编辑过程的直接控制，并在模型推理中引入了稀疏性。在本文中，我们介绍了 FlashPS，这是一个能够有效满足图像编辑请求的系统。 FlashPS 背后的关键见解是图像编辑仅修改图像模板的遮罩区域，同时保留未遮罩区域中的原始内容。在这种洞察力的驱动下，FlashPS 通过重用先前推理中缓存的中间激活，明智地跳过与未屏蔽区域相关的冗余计算。为了减轻高缓存加载开销，FlashPS 采用无气泡管道方案，将计算与缓存加载重叠。此外，为了减少在线服务中的排队延迟，同时提高 GPU 利用率，FlashPS 提出了一种新颖的扩散模型服务连续批处理策略，允许新到达的请求只需一步去噪计算即可加入正在运行的批处理，而无需等待整个批处理完成。由于异构掩码会导致负载不平衡，FlashPS 还开发了一种负载平衡策略，该策略同时考虑计算和缓存加载的负载。总的来说，FlashPS 的性能优于最先进的图像编辑扩散服务系统，吞吐量提高了 3 倍，平均请求延迟降低了 14.7 倍，同时保证了图像质量。

items.title: MegaScale-MoE: Large-Scale Communication-Efficient Training of Mixture-of-Experts Models in Production.
items.abstract:
We present MegaScale-MoE, a production system tailored for the efficient training of large-scale mixture-of-experts (MoE) models. MoE emerges as a promising architecture to scale large language models (LLMs) to unprecedented sizes, thereby enhancing model performance. However, existing MoE training systems experience a degradation in training efficiency, exacerbated by the escalating scale of MoE models and the continuous evolution of hardware.

Recognizing the pivotal role of efficient communication in enhancing MoE training, MegaScale-MoE customizes communication-efficient parallelism strategies for attention and FFNs in each MoE layer and adopts a holistic approach to overlap communication with computation at both inter- and intra-operator levels. Additionally, MegaScale-MoE applies communication compression with adjusted communication patterns to lower precision, further improving training efficiency. When training a 352B MoE model on 1,440 NVIDIA Hopper GPUs, MegaScale-MoE achieves a training throughput of 1.41M tokens/s, improving the efficiency by 1.88X compared to Megatron-LM. We share our operational experience in accelerating MoE training and hope that by offering our insights in system design, this work will motivate future research in MoE systems.
items.abstract_zh:
我们推出了 MegaScale-MoE，这是一种专为高效训练大规模专家混合 (MoE) 模型而定制的生产系统。 MoE 是一种很有前途的架构，可以将大型语言模型 (LLM) 扩展到前所未有的规模，从而提高模型性能。然而，现有的 MoE 训练系统的训练效率下降，而 MoE 模型规模的不断扩大和硬件的不断发展加剧了这种情况。

认识到高效通信在增强 MoE 训练中的关键作用，MegaScale-MoE 为每个 MoE 层的注意力和 FFN 定制了通信高效的并行策略，并采用整体方法在算子间和算子内级别将通信与计算重叠。此外，MegaScale-MoE 通过调整通信模式应用通信压缩来降低精度，进一步提高训练效率。在 1,440 个 NVIDIA Hopper GPU 上训练 352B MoE 模型时，MegaScale-MoE 实现了 1.41M tokens/s 的训练吞吐量，与 Megatron-LM 相比，效率提高了 1.88 倍。我们分享我们在加速教育部培训方面的操作经验，并希望通过提供我们在系统设计方面的见解，这项工作将推动教育部系统的未来研究。

items.title: Wayfinder: Automated Operating System Specialization.
items.abstract:
Operating system specialization is a well-known approach to optimize a specific application's performance, memory usage, security, or other important metrics. Specializing an OS for an application is typically a manual process that requires great expertise. Specialization through configuration lends itself well to automation; however, it is challenging due to the sheer size of the configuration space of modern OSes, the difficulty to quantify that space, the long time it takes to evaluate a configuration, and the large number of invalid configurations. Hence, existing attempts at specializing OSes automatically are limited to switching features on and off to minimize memory consumption or attack surface, and cannot target metrics such as performance.

We present Wayfinder, a framework specializing the configuration of OSes completely automatically and without expert knowledge. It can specialize all aspects of an OS configuration (compile-/boot-/run-time) towards any quantifiable performance, resource consumption, or security metric, for an application processing a given workload on a given hardware setup. Wayfinder consists of an automated OS benchmarking platform, and a neural network-based search algorithm driving the specialization process. This is achieved by learning on the fly which configuration parameters and values impact performance the most, and which ones lead to runtime failures. Optionally, a model pre-trained on one application can be reused to accelerate the specialization of related applications. We evaluate Wayfinder on two OSes, four applications, and two target metrics: Wayfinder fully automatically identifies specialized configurations with up to 24% application performance improvement and 8.5% memory usage reduction compared to default configurations. We highlight the benefits of our neural network, reaching good solutions faster than competing approaches (random and Bayesian), and successfully transferring knowledge between related applications.
items.abstract_zh:
操作系统专业化是一种众所周知的优化特定应用程序性能、内存使用、安全性或其他重要指标的方法。为应用程序专门设计操作系统通常是一个需要大量专业知识的手动过程。通过配置进行专业化非常适合自动化；然而，由于现代操作系统的配置空间巨大、难以量化该空间、评估配置需要很长时间以及大量无效配置，因此它具有挑战性。因此，现有的自动专用操作系统的尝试仅限于打开和关闭功能以最大限度地减少内存消耗或攻击面，并且无法针对性能等指标。
