我们推出了 Wayfinder，这是一个专门用于完全自动且无需专业知识的操作系统配置的框架。对于在给定硬件设置上处理给定工作负载的应用程序，它可以针对任何可量化的性能、资源消耗或安全指标，专门化操作系统配置（编译/启动/运行时）的所有方面。 Wayfinder 由自动化操作系统基准测试平台和驱动专业化过程的基于神经网络的搜索算法组成。这是通过动态了解哪些配置参数和值对性能影响最大以及哪些导致运行时故障来实现的。或者，可以重复使用在一个应用程序上预训练的模型，以加速相关应用程序的专业化。我们在两个操作系统、四个应用程序和两个目标指标上评估 Wayfinder：与默认配置相比，Wayfinder 完全自动识别专用配置，应用程序性能提高了 24%，内存使用量减少了 8.5%。我们强调神经网络的优势，比竞争方法（随机和贝叶斯）更快地达到良好的解决方案，并在相关应用程序之间成功地转移知识。

items.title: CofferOS: Hardening OS-level Virtualization with Rust.
items.abstract: OS-level virtualization (e.g., Linux containers) has become a cornerstone of modern cloud systems. While it offers the illusion of isolated kernels for processes, these processes share the same underlying kernel, raising critical concerns around security, fault isolation, and the inability to customize kernels. Existing solutions address the issues by employing virtual machines that isolate kernels. However, these approaches incur significant performance overhead. To provide strong isolation and customizability, we propose CofferOS, a new kernel for OS-level virtualization. By combining structural encapsulation with Rust's memory safety guarantees, CofferOS eliminates shared kernel states among containers. The container is implemented as a single class, called Coffer, which contains the entire state of a container. Each running container is instantiated as a separate instance of Coffer. As a result, each container operates in complete isolation, without sharing any state with other containers. Furthermore, CofferOS introduces the Personality mechanism, enabling kernel customization for individual containers through a modular and pluggable design. We implement CofferOS, achieving performance comparable to Linux containers in various workloads and demonstrating its improved security, fault isolation, and customizability, showcasing its practical applicability and flexibility.
items.abstract_zh: 操作系统级虚拟化（例如 Linux 容器）已成为现代云系统的基石。虽然它为进程提供了隔离内核的假象，但这些进程共享相同的底层内核，引发了有关安全性、故障隔离和无法自定义内核的严重担忧。现有的解决方案通过使用隔离内核的虚拟机来解决这些问题。然而，这些方法会产生显着的性能开销。为了提供强大的隔离性和可定制性，我们提出了 CofferOS，一个用于操作系统级虚拟化的新内核。通过将结构封装与 Rust 的内存安全保证相结合，CofferOS 消除了容器之间共享的内核状态。该容器被实现为单个类，称为 Coffer，其中包含容器的整个状态。每个正在运行的容器都被实例化为一个单独的 Coffer 实例。因此，每个容器完全隔离运行，不与其他容器共享任何状态。此外，CofferOS还引入了Personality机制，通过模块化、可插拔的设计，实现对各个容器的内核定制。我们实施了CofferOS，在各种工作负载中实现了与Linux容器相当的性能，并展示了其改进的安全性、故障隔离和可定制性，展示了其实际适用性和灵活性。

items.title: Turnstile: Hybrid Information Flow Control Framework for Managing Privacy in Internet-of-Things Applications.
items.abstract: General awareness in privacy management has increased over the last decade, from consumers, companies, to governments. While cloud and mobile applications have taken steps forward in improving privacy management, the Internet-of-Things (IoT) domain has been behind in this aspect. Managing privacy in IoT applications is challenging, firstly because IoT applications handle data whose privacy implications change dynamically based on the information it contains. Second, the fragmented nature of the IoT ecosystem makes it difficult to apply a solution end-to-end. To provide a solution to privacy management in IoT, we design and implement Turnstile, a hybrid information flow control (IFC) framework. It identifies privacy-sensitive code paths through static taint analysis, and then integrates a dynamic information flow tracking (DIFT) mechanism into the application via selective code instrumentation. We evaluated Turnstile using 61 third-party IoT applications, and show that it can be an effective solution for managing the privacy of IoT applications.
items.abstract_zh: 在过去十年中，从消费者、公司到政府，人们对隐私管理的普遍认识有所提高。虽然云和移动应用程序在改善隐私管理方面取得了进步，但物联网 (IoT) 领域在这方面一直落后。管理物联网应用程序中的隐私具有挑战性，首先因为物联网应用程序处理的数据的隐私影响根据其包含的信息而动态变化。其次，物联网生态系统的分散性使得端到端解决方案的应用变得困难。为了提供物联网隐私管理解决方案，我们设计并实现了 Turnstile，一种混合​​信息流控制 (IFC) 框架。它通过静态污点分析来识别隐私敏感的代码路径，然后通过选择性代码检测将动态信息流跟踪（DIFT）机制集成到应用程序中。我们使用 61 个第三方物联网应用程序对 Turnstile 进行了评估，结果表明它可以成为管理物联网应用程序隐私的有效解决方案。

items.title: Reducing the GPU Memory Bottleneck with Lossless Compression for ML.
items.abstract:
Machine learning (ML) training and inference often process data sets far exceeding GPU memory capacity, forcing them to rely on PCIe for on-demand tensor transfers, causing critical transfer bottlenecks. Lossy compression has been proposed to relieve bottlenecks but introduces workload-dependent accuracy loss, making it complex or even prohibitive to use in existing ML deployments.

We explore lossless compression as an alternative that avoids this deployment complexity. We identify where lossless compression can be integrated into ML pipelines while minimizing interference with GPU execution. Based on our findings, we introduce Invariant Bit Packing (IBP), a novel lossless compression algorithm designed to minimize data transfer time for ML. IBP identifies and eliminates invariant bits across groups of tensors, improving throughput through GPU-optimized decompression that leverages warp parallelism, low-overhead bit operations, and asynchronous PCIe transfers. We provide easy-to-use APIs, showcasing them by adding IBP support to GNN training, as well as DLRM and LLM inference frameworks. IBP achieves, on average, 74% faster GNN training, 180% faster DLRM embedding lookup, and 25% faster LLM inference.
items.abstract_zh:
机器学习 (ML) 训练和推理经常处理远远超出 GPU 内存容量的数据集，迫使它们依赖 PCIe 进行按需张量传输，从而造成严重的传输瓶颈。有损压缩已被提出来缓解瓶颈，但会带来与工作负载相关的准确性损失，使其变得复杂，甚至无法在现有的 ML 部署中使用。

我们探索无损压缩作为避免这种部署复杂性的替代方案。我们确定了无损压缩可以集成到 ML 管道中的位置，同时最大限度地减少对 GPU 执行的干扰。根据我们的发现，我们引入了不变位打包 (IBP)，这是一种新颖的无损压缩算法，旨在最大限度地减少 ML 的数据传输时间。 IBP 识别并消除张量组之间的不变位，通过利用扭曲并行性、低开销位操作和异步 PCIe 传输的 GPU 优化解压缩来提高吞吐量。我们提供易于使用的 API，通过向 GNN 训练添加 IBP 支持以及 DLRM 和 LLM 推理框架来展示它们。平均而言，IBP 的 GNN 训练速度提高了 74%，DLRM 嵌入查找速度提高了 180%，LLM 推理速度提高了 25%。

items.title: Handling Network Faults in Distributed AI Training: Failover is Now an Option.
items.abstract: Distributed AI training often suffers from network faults. Network faults, especially at the last hop between a switch and a host, result in loss of connectivity, resulting in training job stalls and eventual failure. This is typically managed through a fail-stop mechanism, followed by a restart, incurring significant inefficiencies. We present ReCCL, the first network fault-tolerant collective communication library (CCL) that allows training progress to be preserved by seamlessly failing over to alternate paths when a network fault occurs. During failover, ReCCL keeps communication states synchronized while using dynamic channel load balancing and intra-host GPU routing to improve communication performance. Our evaluations demonstrate that ReCCL can perform failover seamlessly with minimal performance losses. Additionally, our simulations also demonstrate that failover can be effectively used to achieve significant savings in GPU hours for large-scale distributed AI training workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式人工智能训练经常会出现网络故障。网络故障，尤其是交换机和主机之间的最后一跳，会导致连接丢失，从而导致训练作业停滞并最终失败。这通常通过故障停止机制进行管理，然后重新启动，从而导致效率显着低下。我们推出了 ReCCL，这是第一个网络容错集体通信库 (CCL)，它允许在网络故障发生时通过无缝故障转移到备用路径来保留训练进度。在故障转移期间，ReCCL 保持通信状态同步，同时使用动态通道负载平衡和主机内 GPU 路由来提高通信性能。我们的评估表明，ReCCL 可以以最小的性能损失无缝执行故障转移。此外，我们的模拟还表明，可以有效地使用故障转移来显着节省大规模分布式 AI 训练工作负载的 GPU 时间。

items.title: TCO-driven Storage Provisioning for Exascale Data Centers.
items.abstract:
Recent changes in data temperatures and storage device characteristics, both mechanical disk-drives (HDDs) and solid-state drives (SSDs), expand the set of deployment options for exascale storage. Until recently, exascale storage systems followed a pattern of placing most data on HDDs with smaller amounts of SSD storage used for caching and performance-critical workloads. Exascale storage provisioning and dataset placement trade-offs have now changed.

This paper describes a total cost of ownership (TCO) model that captures primary aspects of modern deployments and uses it to explore the new trade-off space. Using capacity and performance telemetry information for 43 production datasets+workloads at two large hyperscalers, we show significant changes from prior analyses of workloads and storage placement decisions across a multitude of storage device types. We also introduce a storage cluster TCO optimizer that identifies the lowest-TCO grouping and assignment of datasets to device types, exposing a number of insights that can help guide future deployments. For example, our analysis shows that the highest-density SSDs are particularly favorable for clusters with heavy AI/ML workloads but are only cost-effective at exascale when combined with high-density HDDs. Finally, we use our framework to evaluate how storage provisioning and overall TCO change as a function of key parameters like device write amplification, cluster power bounds, and the maximum number of device types allowed.
items.abstract_zh:
最近数据温度和存储设备特性（机械磁盘驱动器 (HDD) 和固态驱动器 (SSD)）的变化扩大了亿亿次存储的部署选项集。直到最近，百亿亿级存储系统仍遵循将大部分数据放置在 HDD 上的模式，并使用少量 SSD 存储用于缓存和性能关键型工作负载。百亿亿次级存储配置和数据集放置权衡现已发生变化。

本文描述了一个总体拥有成本 (TCO) 模型，该模型捕获了现代部署的主要方面，并用它来探索新的权衡空间。使用两个大型超大规模企业的 43 个生产数据集和工作负载的容量和性能遥测信息，我们展示了与之前对多种存储设备类型的工作负载和存储布局决策的分析相比的显着变化。我们还引入了一个存储集群 TCO 优化器，它可以识别 TCO 最低的分组以及将数据集分配给设备类型，从而提供许多有助于指导未来部署的见解。例如，我们的分析表明，最高密度的 SSD 特别适合具有繁重 AI/ML 工作负载的集群，但仅在与高密度 HDD 结合使用时才具有百亿亿级的成本效益。最后，我们使用我们的框架来评估存储配置和总体 TCO 如何随着设备写入放大、集群功率限制和允许的最大设备类型数量等关键参数的变化而变化。

items.title: Garen: Reliable Cluster Management with Atomic State Reconciliation.
items.abstract:
Modern cluster managers orchestrate large-scale services and resources through a set of controllers , each managing a specific part of the cluster by iteratively reconciling the cluster states into the desired states. However, controllers are prone to various state inconsistencies stemming from asynchrony, concurrency, and failures, posing significant challenges in reliable cluster operation. Our analysis of 51 consistency bugs in Kubernetes controllers reveals that many issues remain unresolved, and even proposed fixes are often rejected for backward incompatibility or performance loss.

We present Garen, a system that implements atomic state reconciliation (ASR) , a technique that ensures atomicity and consistency of reconciliation to protect the cluster against state inconsistencies. To achieve full-fledged ASR, Garen addresses several challenges. First, to ensure high scalability, Garen detects conflicts within the minimal states involved in the reconciliation process. To pinpoint this dynamically changing set of states, Garen decomposes the reconciliation logic into smaller, conditionally executed blocks. It then confines conflict detection to the states relevant to the involved blocks in a given reconciliation. Moreover, Garen ensures that all state transitions within ASR comply with dynamic cluster constraints by leveraging the dry-run feature to verify state transitions in advance, allowing for atomic execution. For stateful checks that can introduce races, Garen proposes an ASR-based execution model to prevent such races. Lastly, Garen transpiler automatically instruments existing controllers to use Garen, enhancing usability. Through real-world case studies, Garen resolves 18 previously unresolved consistency bugs without manual code changes. It also maintains scalability across various API request rates and cluster sizes, with a latency overhead under 3%.
items.abstract_zh:
现代集群管理器通过一组控制器编排大规模服务和资源，每个控制器通过迭代地将集群状态调整为所需状态来管理集群的特定部分。然而，控制器很容易出现由于异步、并发和故障而导致的各种状态不一致，这对集群的可靠运行提出了重大挑战。我们对 Kubernetes 控制器中的 51 个一致性错误的分析表明，许多问题仍未解决，甚至提出的修复方案也经常因向后不兼容或性能损失而被拒绝。

我们提出了 Garen，一个实现原子状态协调（ASR）的系统，这是一种确保协调的原子性和一致性的技术，以保护集群免受状态不一致的影响。为了实现全面的 ASR，Garen 解决了几个挑战。首先，为了确保高可扩展性，Garen 检测协调过程中涉及的最小状态内的冲突。为了精确定位这组动态变化的状态，Garen 将协调逻辑分解为更小的、有条件执行的块。然后，它将冲突检测限制在与给定协调中涉及的块相关的状态。此外，Garen 通过利用试运行功能提前验证状态转换，确保 ASR 内的所有状态转换符合动态集群约束，从而允许原子执行。对于可能引入竞争的状态检查，Garen 提出了一种基于 ASR 的执行模型来防止此类竞争。最后，Garen 转译器会自动检测现有控制器以使用 Garen，从而增强可用性。通过实际案例研究，Garen 解决了 18 个以前未解决的一致性错误，而无需手动更改代码。它还在各种 API 请求率和集群大小之间保持可扩展性，延迟开销低于 3%。

items.title: FlexiQ: Adaptive Mixed-Precision Quantization for Latency/Accuracy Trade-Offs in Deep Neural Networks.
items.abstract:
Neural networks commonly execute on hardware accelerators such as NPUs and GPUs for their size and computation overhead. These accelerators are costly and it is hard to scale their resources to handle real-time workload fluctuations.

We present FlexiQ, an adaptive mixed-precision quantization scheme for computer vision models. FlexiQ selectively applies low-bitwidth computation to feature channels with small value ranges and employs an efficient bit-lowering method to minimize quantization errors while maintaining inference accuracy. Furthermore, FlexiQ adjusts its low-bitwidth channel ratio in real time, enabling quantized models to effectively manage fluctuating inference workload.

We implemented FlexiQ prototype, including the mixed-precision inference runtime on our custom NPU and GPUs. Evaluated on eleven convolution- and transformer-based vision models, FlexiQ achieves on average 6.6% higher accuracy for 4-bit models with finetuning and outperforms four state-of-the-art quantization techniques. Moreover, our mixed-precision models achieved an efficient accuracy-latency tradeoff, with the 50% 4-bit model incurring only 0.6% accuracy loss while achieving 40% of the speedup of the 100% 4-bit model over 8-bit model. Latency evaluations on our NPU and GPUs confirmed that FlexiQ introduces minimal runtime overhead, demonstrating its hardware efficiency and overall performance benefits.
items.abstract_zh:
由于 NPU 和 GPU 等硬件加速器的大小和计算开销，神经网络通常在硬件加速器上执行。这些加速器成本高昂，并且很难扩展其资源来处理实时工作负载波动。

我们提出了 FlexiQ，一种用于计算机视觉模型的自适应混合精度量化方案。 FlexiQ选择性地将低位宽计算应用于具有小值范围的特征通道，并采用高效的降位方法来最大限度地减少量化误差，同时保持推理精度。此外，FlexiQ 实时调整其低位宽通道比率，使量化模型能够有效管理波动的推理工作负载。

我们实现了 FlexiQ 原型，包括在我们的定制 NPU 和 GPU 上的混合精度推理运行时。在 11 个基于卷积和变换器的视觉模型上进行评估后，FlexiQ 通过微调使 4 位模型的准确度平均提高 6.6%，并且优于四种最先进的量化技术。此外，我们的混合精度模型实现了有效的精度与延迟权衡，50% 4 位模型仅导致 0.6% 的精度损失，同时与 8 位模型相比，100% 4 位模型的加速提高了 40%。对我们的 NPU 和 GPU 的延迟评估证实，FlexiQ 引入的运行时开销最小，展示了其硬件效率和整体性能优势。

items.title: TierScape: Harnessing Multiple Compressed Tiers to Tame Server Memory TCO.
items.abstract:
Tiered memory systems are the norm to effectively tackle the increasing memory total cost of ownership (TCO) in modern data centers. We propose TierScape to tame memory TCO through the novel creation and judicious management of multiple compressed memory tiers along with multiple byte-addressable tiers.

As opposed to conventional tiering solutions that employ a single compressed memory tier, we harness multiple compressed tiers implemented through a combination of different compression algorithms, memory allocators for compressed objects, and backing media to store compressed objects. These compressed tiers represent distinct points in the access latency, data compressibility, and unit memory usage cost spectrum, allowing rich and flexible trade-offs between memory TCO savings and application performance impact. A key advantage with TierScape is that it enables aggressive memory TCO saving opportunities by placing warm data in low latency compressed tiers with a reasonable performance impact while simultaneously placing cold data in the best memory TCO saving tiers.

TierScape presents a comprehensive, rigorous, and tunable analytical cost model for performance and TCO trade-off based on continuous monitoring of the application's data access profile. Guided by this model, TierScape takes informed actions to dynamically manage the placement and migration of application data across multiple compressed and byte-addressable tiers. We believe TierScape represents an important server system configuration and optimization capability to achieve the best SLA-aware performance per dollar for applications hosted in production data center environments. For a set of real-world benchmarks, TierScape reduces memory TCO by 15.1–23.6% percentage points while maintaining performance parity or improves performance by 2.61–10.0% percentage points while maintaining memory TCO parity compared to state-of-the-art tiering solutions.
items.abstract_zh:
分层内存系统是有效解决现代数据中心不断增长的内存总拥有成本 (TCO) 问题的标准。我们建议 TierScape 通过新颖的创建和明智的管理多个压缩内存层以及多个字节可寻址层来控制内存 TCO。

与采用单个压缩内存层的传统分层解决方案相反，我们利用通过不同压缩算法、压缩对象的内存分配器以及存储压缩对象的支持介质的组合来实现的多个压缩层。这些压缩层代表了访问延迟、数据压缩性和单位内存使用成本范围中的不同点，允许在内存 TCO 节省和应用程序性能影响之间进行丰富且灵活的权衡。 TierScape 的一个关键优势是，它通过将热数据放置在具有合理性能影响的低延迟压缩层中，同时将冷数据放置在最佳内存 TCO 节省层中，从而实现积极的内存 TCO 节省机会。

TierScape 基于对应用程序数据访问配置文件的持续监控，提供了全面、严格且可调整的性能和 TCO 权衡分析成本模型。在此模型的指导下，TierScape 采取明智的行动来动态管理应用程序数据在多个压缩和字节可寻址层之间的放置和迁移。我们相信 TierScape 代表了重要的服务器系统配置和优化功能，可以为生产数据中心环境中托管的应用程序实现最佳的 SLA 感知性能。对于一组实际基准，与最先进的分层解决方案相比，TierScape 在保持性能平价的同时将内存 TCO 降低了 15.1–23.6%，或者在保持内存 TCO 平价的同时将性能提高了 2.61–10.0%。

items.title: BASK: Batch And SmartNIC-offloaded KSM.
items.abstract:
Modern cloud servers are increasingly constrained by memory capacity and bandwidth, despite dramatic growth in CPU core counts. Kernel Same-page Merging (KSM) alleviates memory pressure by deduplicating redundant pages, but incurs significant CPU overhead and performance interference due to frequent comparisons and hashing. Prior work reduces this burden through stateless offloading to accelerators such as SmartNICs, but suffers from low deduplication throughput due to frequent communication overhead.

This paper presents BASK, a stateful SmartNIC-based framework for KSM that offloads both control-plane and data-plane deduplication tasks. BASK introduces a transactional offloading model with optimistic concurrency control and shadow metadata, enabling batched, self-contained page deduplication, significantly improving deduplication throughput by minimizing communication overhead between host and SmartNIC. It tolerates SmartNIC failures, ensures safety through validation and rollback, and maintains isolation using read-only memory exposure. Evaluation under realistic cloud workloads shows that BASK improves deduplication throughput by up to 3.68× over standard KSM, while reducing Redis tail latency impact to only 1.42×, compared to 10.02× under aggressive KSM settings.
items.abstract_zh:
尽管 CPU 核心数量急剧增长，但现代云服务器越来越受到内存容量和带宽的限制。内核同页合并（KSM）通过重复删除冗余页来缓解内存压力，但由于频繁的比较和哈希，会产生大量的 CPU 开销和性能干扰。之前的工作通过无状态卸载到 SmartNIC 等加速器来减轻这种负担，但由于频繁的通信开销，重复数据删除吞吐量较低。

本文介绍了 BASK，这是一种基于 SmartNIC 的有状态 KSM 框架，可卸载控制平面和数据平面重复数据删除任务。 BASK引入了具有乐观并发控制和影子元数据的事务卸载模型，支持批量、独立的页面重复数据删除，通过最大限度地减少主机和SmartNIC之间的通信开销，显着提高重复数据删除吞吐量。它可以容忍 SmartNIC 故障，通过验证和回滚确保安全，并使用只读内存暴露保持隔离。在实际云工作负载下的评估表明，与标准 KSM 相比，BASK 将重复数据删除吞吐量提高了 3.68 倍，同时将 Redis 尾部延迟影响降低至仅 1.42 倍，而激进的 KSM 设置下为 10.02 倍。

items.title: MTTM: Dynamic Fast Memory Partitioning with Bandwidth Optimization for Multi-tenant Cloud.
items.abstract:
Memory tiering, which extends local DRAM by incorporating remote DRAM or NVM via Compute Express Link (CXL), offers a promising solution to the DRAM capacity scaling problem. However, in multi-tenant cloud environments, efficient management of fast memory requires not only optimizing data movement across tiers but also effectively distributing DRAM capacity when tenants compete. Moreover, bandwidth utilization is critically impacted by memory request rejection, which depends on the distribution of local DRAM. While previous research has extensively addressed data movement, DRAM distribution among multiple tenants remains underexplored.

This work tackles the challenges of local DRAM distribution and efficient bandwidth utilization in multi-tenant cloud environments. We propose MTTM, a tiered memory system that implements DRAM-sensitivity-based memory partitioning strategy, allocates fast memory based on workload characteristics, and dynamically adjusts local DRAM allocation to mitigate memory request rejection. Implemented in Linux v5.15, MTTM is evaluated on nine cloud workloads, demonstrating clear performance improvements over state-of-the-art baselines across various workload mixes, memory configuration, and remote memory access latencies.
items.abstract_zh:
内存分层通过计算快速链路 (CXL) 合并远程 DRAM 或 NVM 来扩展本地 DRAM，为 DRAM 容量扩展问题提供了一种有前景的解决方案。然而，在多租户云环境中，快速内存的高效管理不仅需要优化跨层的数据移动，还需要在租户竞争时有效分配 DRAM 容量。此外，带宽利用率受到内存请求拒绝的严重影响，这取决于本地 DRAM 的分布。虽然之前的研究已经广泛讨论了数据移动问题，但多个租户之间的 DRAM 分配仍未得到充分探索。

这项工作解决了多租户云环境中本地 DRAM 分配和高效带宽利用的挑战。我们提出了 MTTM，一种分层内存系统，它实现基于 DRAM 敏感性的内存分区策略，根据工作负载特征分配快速内存，并动态调整本地 DRAM 分配以减轻内存请求拒绝。 MTTM 在 Linux v5.15 中实施，在九个云工作负载上进行了评估，证明在各种工作负载组合、内存配置和远程内存访问延迟方面，性能比最先进的基准有明显的改进。

items.title: Million-Scale Text-to-Video Retrieval with Hyperdimensional Computing.
items.abstract: Scalable video retrieval is increasingly challenging as datasets reach tens of millions of videos. Current text-to-video retrieval (T2VR) methods either compress videos into single dense vectors, losing segment-level detail, or expand them into multi-frame representations, incurring prohibitive storage and search costs. We propose a binary hyperdimensional representation that encodes each video into a compact 3,072-dimension hypervector, preserving semantic fidelity while reducing memory via bit-packing. To leverage the properties of hypervectors for sublinear search, we introduce Hypervector Retrieval (HVR), a frequency-aware inverted index that prioritizes rare informative positions and refines candidates using GPU-accelerated Hamming search. Experiments show that our approach matches or exceeds dense baselines for T2VR and surpasses state-of-the-art partially relevant video retrieval (PRVR) by over 5% Recall@ 10 on ActivityNet. At scale, HVR processes over 2,000 queries per second on 10M videos, maintains recall within 1% of exact search, and achieves 5.3× greater storage capacity than CLIP4Clip and over 2,116× over MS-SL.
items.abstract_zh: 随着数据集达到数千万个视频，可扩展的视频检索变得越来越具有挑战性。当前的文本到视频检索（T2VR）方法要么将视频压缩为单个密集向量，从而丢失片段级细节，要么将其扩展为多帧表示，从而导致高昂的存储和搜索成本。我们提出了一种二进制超维表示，将每个视频编码为紧凑的 3,072 维超向量，保持语义保真度，同时通过位打包减少内存。为了利用超向量的特性进行次线性搜索，我们引入了超向量检索 (HVR)，这是一种频率感知倒排索引，它可以优先考虑稀有信息位置，并使用 GPU 加速的汉明搜索来细化候选位置。实验表明，我们的方法匹配或超过了 T2VR 的密集基线，并在 ActivityNet 上超过了最先进的部分相关视频检索 (PRVR)，Recall@10 超过 5%。从规模上看，HVR 每秒可处理 1000 万视频超过 2,000 次查询，将精确搜索的召回率保持在 1% 以内，并实现比 CLIP4Clip 高 5.3 倍的存储容量，比 MS-SL 高 2,116 倍以上的存储容量。

items.title: viNPU: Optimizing Vision Transformer Inference on Mobile NPUs.
items.abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have emerged as the dominant architecture for visual understanding, powering Vision Foundation Models (VFMs) that excel in zero-shot prediction across diverse environments in spatial computing applications. These applications demand efficient, on-device execution to meet stringent latency requirements, yet deploying large VFMs on mobile Neural Processing Units (NPUs) presents two critical bottlenecks: performance imbalance between the NPU's heterogeneous compute units, and severe DRAM access overhead in scaled Transformers due to limited on-chip memory. To address these challenges, we propose viNPU, an inference optimization framework that enables efficient execution of VFMs on mobile NPUs. viNPU incorporates (1) sensitivity-guided mixed-precision quantization that effectively balances accuracy and latency; (2) dataflow optimization to maximize on-chip data locality and hardware utilization; and (3) a profiling-based offline stage to ensure real-time performance on mobile NPUs with minimal accuracy drop. Our evaluation on representative VFMs (e.g., Depth Anything V2, Segment Anything) across commercial mobile devices equipped with Qualcomm Hexagon NPUs demonstrates that viNPU achieves an average 11.5× speedup and up to 44.9× energy savings over baselines, while incurring negligible accuracy degradation compared to floatingpoint executions.
items.abstract_zh: 视觉变换器 (ViT) 已成为视觉理解的主导架构，为视觉基础模型 (VFM) 提供支持，该模型在空间计算应用中的不同环境中擅长进行零样本预测。这些应用程序需要高效的设备上执行来满足严格的延迟要求，但在移动神经处理单元 (NPU) 上部署大型 VFM 会带来两个关键瓶颈：NPU 异构计算单元之间的性能不平衡，以及由于片上内存有限而在扩展 Transformer 中产生严重的 DRAM 访问开销。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了 viNPU，这是一种推理优化框架，可以在移动 NPU 上高效执行 VFM。 viNPU 融合了 (1) 灵敏度引导的混合精度量化，可有效平衡精度和延迟； (2) 数据流优化，最大化片上数据局部性和硬件利用率； (3) 基于分析的离线阶段，以确保移动 NPU 的实时性能，同时将精度下降降至最低。我们对配备 Qualcomm Hexagon NPU 的商用移动设备上的代表性 VFM（例如 Depth Anything V2、Segment Anything）进行的评估表明，viNPU 与基准相比平均实现了 11.5 倍的加速和高达 44.9 倍的节能，同时与浮点执行相比，精度下降可以忽略不计。

items.title: Ethane: Debloating State Data using Compact Trie for Account-based Blockchain.
items.abstract: Account-based blockchains can suffer from huge state data as the number of accounts soars, as in the current Ethereum. This makes it hard to synchronize and operate as a full node to verify transactions, or as an archive node to maintain all archive data for provenance queries. The problem is mostly caused by the state trie , a tree-like data structure to store account states in its leaves, where an account has a path key to follow to access the account. Whenever an account is updated in the state trie, all trie nodes along the path key from the leaf to the root are newly created, which causes a data explosion. In this paper, we propose a novel state optimization technique called Ethane. Instead of assigning a fixed, hash-based path key for an account as in Ethereum, Ethane assigns a variable, counter-based path key. So, when a transaction creates or updates an account, Ethane creates a new leaf node for the account and assigns a path key of the next counter value, which has an effect of adding the leaf to the rightmost slot of the trie. This compact trie maximizes common parent nodes and minimizes the creation of new non-leaf nodes, significantly reducing the archive data size. In addition, Ethane maintains two types of compact tries: an active trie for frequently updated accounts and an inactive trie for dormant accounts not updated for a long time (e.g., three months). Dormant accounts are transferred to the inactive trie but can be reactivated at any time via a restore transaction. When synchronizing as a full node, we only need to download the active trie and the rightmost path of the inactive trie to function fully, significantly reducing both storage requirements and synchronization overhead. Our evaluation shows that Ethane can downsize the archive state data by 60–85% and the current state trie by 60–94%. It also doubles the block execution performance.
items.abstract_zh: 随着账户数量的激增，基于账户的区块链可能会受到巨大的状态数据的影响，就像当前的以太坊一样。这使得很难同步和作为完整节点运行来验证交易，或作为存档节点来维护所有存档数据以进行来源查询。该问题主要是由状态 trie 引起的，这是一种树状数据结构，用于在其叶子中存储帐户状态，其中帐户具有访问帐户所需的路径键。每当状态 trie 中更新帐户时，从叶到根的路径键上的所有 trie 节点都会被重新创建，这会导致数据爆炸。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 Ethane 的新型状态优化技术。 Ethane 没有像以太坊那样为帐户分配固定的、基于哈希的路径密钥，而是分配一个可变的、基于计数器的路径密钥。因此，当交易创建或更新帐户时，Ethane 会为该帐户创建一个新的叶子节点，并分配下一个计数器值的路径键，这具有将叶子添加到 trie 的最右边槽的效果。这种紧凑的 trie 最大化了公共父节点并最小化了新的非叶节点的创建，从而显着减少了归档数据的大小。此外，Ethane 维护两种类型的紧凑 trie：用于频繁更新帐户的活动 trie 和用于长时间（例如三个月）未更新的休眠帐户的非活动 trie。休眠帐户将转移到非活动特里树，但可以随时通过恢复事务重新激活。当作为全节点同步时，我们只需要下载活动的 trie 和非活动的 trie 的最右边路径即可充分发挥作用，从而显着降低了存储需求和同步开销。我们的评估表明，Ethan 可以将存档状态数据缩小 60-85%，将当前状态树缩小 60-94%。它还使块执行性能加倍。

items.title: AdaServe: Accelerating Multi-SLO LLM Serving with SLO-Customized Speculative Decoding.
items.abstract: Modern large language model (LLM) applications exhibit diverse service-level objectives (SLOs), from low-latency requirements in interactive coding assistants to more relaxed constraints in data wrangling tasks. Existing LLM serving systems, which rely on uniform batching and scheduling strategies, often fail to meet these heterogeneous SLOs concurrently. We present AdaServe, the first LLM serving system designed to support efficient multi-SLO serving through SLO-customized speculative decoding. AdaServe formulates multi-SLO serving as a constrained optimization problem and introduces a hardware-aware algorithm that constructs a speculation tree tailored to each request's latency target. It features a speculate-select-verify pipeline that enables fine-grained control over decoding speed while maximizing system throughput. AdaServe further adapts to workload variation by dynamically adjusting speculation parameters. Evaluations across diverse workloads show that AdaServe reduces SLO violations by up to 4.3X and improves goodput by up to 1.9X compared to the best-performing baselines, highlighting its effectiveness in multi-SLO serving.
items.abstract_zh: 现代大型语言模型 (LLM) 应用程序展示了不同的服务级别目标 (SLO)，从交互式编码助手的低延迟要求到数据整理任务中更宽松的约束。现有的 LLM 服务系统依赖于统一的批处理和调度策略，通常无法同时满足这些异构 SLO。我们推出 AdaServe，这是第一个 LLM 服务系统，旨在通过 SLO 定制推测解码支持高效的多 SLO 服务。 AdaServe 将多 SLO 制定为约束优化问题，并引入硬件感知算法，该算法构建适合每个请求延迟目标的推测树。它具有推测-选择-验证管道，可对解码速度进行细粒度控制，同时最大限度地提高系统吞吐量。 AdaServe 通过动态调整推测参数来进一步适应工作负载变化。对不同工作负载的评估表明，与最佳性能基准相比，AdaServe 将 SLO 违规减少了高达 4.3 倍，并将吞吐量提高了高达 1.9 倍，凸显了其在多 SLO 服务中的有效性。

items.title: PointShuffler: Accelerating Point Cloud Neural Networks on General-Purpose GPUs.
items.abstract:
Point Cloud Neural Networks (PCNNs) have emerged as a vital tool for latency-sensitive 3D perception applications, such as autonomous driving and AR/VR. However, their inherent computational redundancy—arising from excessive global sampling/search operations and repeated feature updates/aggregations caused by shared neighbors—severely constrains execution efficiency. More critically, conventional redundancy elimination methods usually introduce operations that are highly GPU-unfriendly, resulting in high memory overhead, increased branch divergence, irregular memory access, and serial dependencies, which together pose a significant challenge to PCNN acceleration.

To this end, we propose PointShuffler, the first-of-its-kind GPU-friendly inference engine that efficiently eliminates PCNN redundancy with preserved accuracy. It consists of three enabling optimizations: (1) Network Architecture Transformation, which can convert a typical PCNN into an architecture variant with well-eliminated redundancy while negligible accuracy losses; (2) Data Orchestration, which arranges the irregular data access inherent in 3D point clouds into deterministic and contiguous data access, to fundamentally alleviate the costs from data access, branch divergence, and data movement; and (3) Operation Parallelization, which enables parallel sampling and neighbor searching by eliminating serial dependencies lie in the core operations of PCNNs. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of PointShuffler, achieving an average of 6.15× speedup and at least 5.30× memory saving without accuracy loss. The codes of PointShuffler are released at https://github.com/Jeff5trick/PointShuffler.
items.abstract_zh:
点云神经网络 (PCNN) 已成为自动驾驶和 AR/VR 等延迟敏感的 3D 感知应用的重要工具。然而，它们固有的计算冗余（由于过度的全局采样/搜索操作和共享邻居引起的重复特征更新/聚合而产生）严重限制了执行效率。更关键的是，传统的冗余消除方法通常会引入对GPU高度不友好的操作，导致较高的内存开销、增加的分支发散、不规则的内存访问和串行依赖，这些共同对PCNN加速构成了重大挑战。

为此，我们提出了 PointShuffler，这是第一个 GPU 友好的推理引擎，可以有效消除 PCNN 冗余并保持准确性。它由三个支持优化组成：（1）网络架构转换，可以将典型的 PCNN 转换为冗余消除良好且精度损失可以忽略不计的架构变体； （2）数据编排，将3D点云固有的不规则数据访问安排为确定性、连续的数据访问，从根本上降低数据访问、分支发散和数据移动的成本； (3)操作并行化，它通过消除 PCNN 的核心操作中的串行依赖性来实现并行采样和邻居搜索。大量的实验结果证明了 PointShuffler 的有效性，在不损失精度的情况下，平均加速了 6.15 倍，节省了至少 5.30 倍的内存。 PointShuffler的代码发布于https://github.com/Jeff5trick/PointShuffler。

items.title: Pyramid: A Secure, Resource-Efficient, and Pluggable Kubernetes for Multi-Tenancy.
items.abstract: This work aims to achieve the best of both worlds with two prominent techniques adopted in cloud computing systems: hardware trusted execution environments (TEEs) for data processing security, and Kubernetes (k8s) for efficient container orchestration and resource management for multi-tenancy. A secure, resource-efficient, and pluggable container orchestration system, called Pyramid, is proposed, which incurs minimal intrusive modifications to the commercial k8s. Pyramid puts a separate trusted k8s on top of the original k8s cluster and carefully cooperates between the two layers. The workflow within each layer is maximally preserved without significant changes. The untrusted layer manages resource scheduling across different tenants to improve utilization and passes the resource information to the trusted layer to launch actual computations secured by TEEs, with the help of carefully designed interface and protection mechanisms. Evaluation results show that Pyramid achieves 1.4X higher throughput on the data plane, with comparable control-plane performance to previous work.
items.abstract_zh: 这项工作旨在通过云计算系统中采用的两项突出技术实现两全其美：用于数据处理安全的硬件可信执行环境（TEE）和用于高效容器编排和多租户资源管理的 Kubernetes（k8s）。提出了一种安全、资源高效、可插拔的容器编排系统，称为 Pyramid，它对商业 k8s 进行最小的侵入性修改。 Pyramid 在原始 k8s 集群之上放置了一个单独的可信 k8s，并在两层之间进行仔细的协作。每层内的工作流程都得到最大程度的保留，无需进行重大更改。不可信层管理不同租户之间的资源调度，以提高利用率，并将资源信息传递到可信层，借助精心设计的接口和保护机制，启动受 TEE 保护的实际计算。评估结果表明，Pyramid 在数据平面上实现了 1.4 倍的吞吐量提高，控制平面性能与之前的工作相当。

items.title: ColdCode: Cold Data Encoding for Enhanced Reliability and Lifetime in 3D NAND Flash.
items.abstract: Cold storage, which stores rarely accessed data, dominates modern data centers but is poorly served by NAND flash's data randomization. As a common practice today by flash vendors, data randomization is applied in NAND flash chips to avoid extreme data patterns that generate the worst-case raw bit error rate (RBER). However, this paper demonstrates that data randomization rules out the opportunity to explore data patterns with very low RBERs, through a comprehensive analysis on data randomization in 3D NAND flash chips (across 8 models). Motivated by this, we propose ColdCode , a novel data coding framework to replace the conventional randomizer in 3D high-density flash for cold data storage. Using a tag that indicates coldness information passed from the file system to solid-state drive (SSD) controllers, the controller encodes cold data to enhance reliability and extend the lifetime. ColdCode employs two coding techniques: skewed coding and reversed Huffman coding, applied based on the data entropy. These techniques effectively reduce the RBER of encoded data compared to conventional randomization. Experimental results on real high-density 3D flash chips show that, under the same error conditions, the skewed coding and reversed Huffman coding reduce the average RBER by 42% and 30%, respectively. Consequently, the lifetime of the flash chips is prolonged by factors of 2.97× and 1.7×, respectively, compared to data randomization.
items.abstract_zh: 冷存储用于存储很少访问的数据，在现代数据中心中占据主导地位，但 NAND 闪存的数据随机化效果不佳。作为当今闪存供应商的常见做法，在 NAND 闪存芯片中应用数据随机化以避免产生最坏情况原始误码率 (RBER) 的极端数据模式。然而，本文通过对 3D NAND 闪存芯片（跨 8 个型号）中的数据随机化的全面分析，证明数据随机化排除了探索 RBER 非常低的数据模式的机会。受此启发，我们提出了 ColdCode，一种新颖的数据编码框架，用于取代 3D 高密度闪存中的传统随机发生器，用于冷数据存储。使用指示从文件系统传递到固态驱动器 (SSD) 控制器的冷度信息的标签，控制器对冷数据进行编码，以增强可靠性并延长使用寿命。 ColdCode采用两种编码技术：倾斜编码和逆霍夫曼编码，基于数据熵应用。与传统的随机化相比，这些技术有效地降低了编码数据的 RBER。在真实高密度3D闪存芯片上的实验结果表明，在相同错误条件下，倾斜编码和反向霍夫曼编码的平均RBER分别降低了42%和30%。因此，与数据随机化相比，闪存芯片的寿命分别延长了 2.97 倍和 1.7 倍。

items.title: GeDES: GPU-Driven Discrete Event Network Simulator.
items.abstract: Discrete event network simulator (DES) is a fundamental service for the design, validation and optimization of various networked systems, including traditional computer networks and the recent LLM training/inference systems. Efficient DES is strongly demanded by the community yet not delivered. The reason is: while DES allows for node-level parallelism, its concurrency potential has been significantly under-utilized (usually <5%) due to the limited number of CPU cores. Meanwhile, GPUs, with thousands of cores, have long been overlooked in the design of DES systems due to the incompatibility between GPUs' SIMT architecture and DES's sequential model. In this paper, we aim to achieve ground-breaking performance improvement for DES by designing a novel GPU-driven simulation engine. By carefully manipulating the life cycles of network events and orchestrating them with long- and short-term alignments, we overcome the incompatibility barriers and established GeDES, a high-level parallel and cost-effective DES system. Extensive simulation experiments show that GeDES significantly boosts DES by 33-2400X speedups compared to the SOTA works Unison and DONS. The code is available at https://github.com/mobinets/GeDES.
items.abstract_zh: 离散事件网络模拟器（DES）是各种网络系统（包括传统计算机网络和最近的法学硕士训练/推理系统）的设计、验证和优化的基础服务。社区强烈要求高效的 DES，但尚未实现。原因是：虽然 DES 允许节点级并行，但由于 CPU 核心数量有限，其并发潜力并未得到充分利用（通常<5%）。同时，由于GPU的SIMT架构与DES的顺序模型不兼容，拥有数千个核心的GPU在DES系统的设计中长期以来一直被忽视。在本文中，我们的目标是通过设计一种新颖的 GPU 驱动的仿真引擎来实现 DES 突破性的性能改进。通过仔细操纵网络事件的生命周期并通过长期和短期调整来编排它们，我们克服了不兼容障碍并建立了 GeDES，这是一种高级并行且经济高效的 DES 系统。大量的模拟实验表明，与 SOTA Works Unison 和 DONS 相比，GeDES 将 DES 的速度显着提高了 33-2400 倍。该代码可从 https://github.com/mobinets/GeDES 获取。

items.title: iRoute: Local Routing Table-based Workflow Management in Serverless Computing.
items.abstract:
Serverless computing typically relies on the centralized orchestrator and gateway for function-level and instance-level workflow management. Their intermediary intervention approaches fail to meet the strict microsecond-scale latency requirements of web services. To accelerate workflow execution, prior works have proposed offloading function dependencies to local functions and maintaining connections between frequently invoked instances. However, these methods still suffer from high routing lookup overhead and poor resource efficiency

To address these issues, we propose offloading both orchestrating and routing capabilities from global to local to enable universal 1-hop transfers without compromising resource efficiency. We introduce iRoute , a local routing table-based solution for workflow management. It adopts a dual-layer architecture, where local routing controllers make correct routing decisions while concurrently cooperating with a centralized coordinator to ensure consistency across multiple local routing tables. iRoute can achieve sub-millisecond data transmission latency while maintaining high resource efficiency. Our experimental results demonstrate that iRoute outperforms state-of-the-art systems by up to 27.3X on latency, and improve the throughput by up to 6.7X.
items.abstract_zh:
无服务器计算通常依赖于集中式编排器和网关来进行功能级和实例级工作流管理。他们的中介干预方法无法满足 Web 服务严格的微秒级延迟要求。为了加速工作流程执行，先前的工作提出了将函数依赖性卸载到本地函数并维护频繁调用的实例之间的连接。然而，这些方法仍然存在路由查找开销高、资源效率差的问题

为了解决这些问题，我们建议将编排和路由功能从全局卸载到本地，以在不影响资源效率的情况下实现通用一跳传输。我们推出 iRoute ，这是一种基于本地路由表的工作流管理解决方案。它采用双层架构，本地路由控制器做出正确的路由决策，同时与集中协调器协作以确保多个本地路由表的一致性。 iRoute可以实现亚毫秒级的数据传输延迟，同时保持较高的资源效率。我们的实验结果表明，iRoute 的延迟性能比最先进的系统高出 27.3 倍，吞吐量提高了 6.7 倍。

items.title: HARP: Orchestrating Automated Parallel Training on Heterogeneous GPU Clusters.
items.abstract: With the rapid evolution of GPU architectures, the heterogeneity of model training infrastructures is steadily increasing. In such environments, effectively utilizing all available heterogeneous accelerators becomes critical for distributed model training. However, existing frameworks, which are primarily designed for homogeneous clusters, often exhibit significant resource underutilization when deployed on heterogeneous accelerators and networks. In this paper, we present Harp, an automated parallel training framework designed specifically for heterogeneous clusters. Harp introduces a fine-grained planner that efficiently searches a wide space for the inter-operator parallel strategy, enabling Harp to alleviate communication overheads while maintaining balanced loads across heterogeneous accelerators. In addition, Harp implements a heterogeneity-aware 1F1B scheduler that adaptively adjusts the execution timing and ordering of microbatches based on network characteristics, maximizing computation-communication overlap under cross-cluster interconnects while incurring only minimal memory overhead. Our evaluation results show that Harp can deliver 1.3×–1.6× higher performance on heterogeneous clusters than state-of-the-art training frameworks.
items.abstract_zh: 随着GPU架构的快速演进，模型训练基础设施的异构性正在稳步增加。在这种环境中，有效利用所有可用的异构加速器对于分布式模型训练至关重要。然而，现有的框架主要是为同构集群设计的，当部署在异构加速器和网络上时，通常会表现出严重的资源利用率不足。在本文中，我们提出了 Harp，一种专为异构集群设计的自动化并行训练框架。 Harp 引入了细粒度规划器，可以有效地在广阔的空间中搜索运算符间并行策略，从而使 Harp 能够减轻通信开销，同时保持异构加速器之间的负载平衡。此外，Harp 还实现了异构感知 1F1B 调度程序，可根据网络特性自适应调整微批次的执行时序和排序，从而最大限度地提高跨集群互连下的计算通信重叠，同时仅产生最小的内存开销。我们的评估结果表明，Harp 在异构集群上的性能比最先进的训练框架高 1.3 倍到 1.6 倍。

items.title: Demystifying Serverless Costs on Public Platforms: Bridging Billing, Architecture, and OS Scheduling.
items.abstract:
Public cloud serverless platforms have attracted a large user base due to their high scalability, plug-and-play deployment model, and pay-per-use billing. However, compared to virtual machines and container hosting services, modern serverless offerings typically impose higher per-unit time and resource charges. Additionally, billing practices such as wall-clock time allocation-based billing, invocation fees, and usage rounding up can further increase costs.

This work, for the first time, holistically demystifies these costs by conducting an in-depth, top-down characterization and analysis from user-facing billing models, through request serving architectures, and down to operating system scheduling on major public serverless platforms. We quantify, for the first time, how current billing practices inflate billable resources up to 4.35× beyond actual consumption. Also, our analysis reveals previously unreported cost drivers, such as operational patterns of serving architectures that create overheads, details of resource allocation during keep-alive periods, and OS scheduling granularity effects that directly impact both performance and billing. By tracing the sources of costs from billing models down to OS scheduling, we uncover the rationale behind today's expensive serverless billing model and practices and provide insights for designing performant and cost-effective serverless systems.
items.abstract_zh:
公有云无服务器平台因其高可扩展性、即插即用的部署模式和按使用付费的计费方式吸引了大量用户。然而，与虚拟机和容器托管服务相比，现代无服务器产品通常会收取更高的单位时间和资源费用。此外，基于挂钟时间分配的计费、调用费用和使用量四舍五入等计费做法可能会进一步增加成本。

这项工作首次从面向用户的计费模型、请求服务架构、直至主要公共无服务器平台上的操作系统调度进行深入、自上而下的描述和分析，全面揭开了这些成本的神秘面纱。我们首次量化了当前的计费实践如何将计费资源夸大至实际消耗量的 4.35 倍。此外，我们的分析揭示了以前未报告的成本驱动因素，例如产生开销的服务架构的操作模式、保持活动期间资源分配的详细信息以及直接影响性能和计费的操作系统调度粒度影响。通过追踪从计费模型到操作系统调度的成本来源，我们揭示了当今昂贵的无服务器计费模型和实践背后的基本原理，并为设计高性能且经济高效的无服务器系统提供了见解。

items.title: FlexPipe: Adapting Dynamic LLM Serving Through Inflight Pipeline Refactoring in Fragmented Serverless Clusters.
items.abstract:
Serving Large Language Models (LLMs) in production faces significant challenges from highly variable request patterns and severe resource fragmentation in serverless clusters. Current systems rely on static pipeline configurations that struggle to adapt to dynamic workload conditions, leading to substantial inefficiencies.

We present FlexPipe, a novel system that dynamically re-configures pipeline architectures during runtime to address these fundamental limitations. FlexPipe decomposes models into fine-grained stages and intelligently adjusts pipeline granularity based on real-time request pattern analysis, implementing three key innovations: fine-grained model partitioning with preserved computational graph constraints, inflight pipeline refactoring with consistent cache transitions, and topology-aware resource allocation that navigates GPU fragmentation. Comprehensive evaluation on an 82-GPU cluster demonstrates that FlexPipe achieves up to 8.5x better resource efficiency while maintaining 38.3% lower latency compared to state-of-the-art systems, reducing GPU reservation requirements from 75% to 30% of peak capacity.
items.abstract_zh:
在生产中为大型语言模型 (LLM) 提供服务面临着来自无服务器集群中高度可变的请求模式和严重资源碎片的重大挑战。当前的系统依赖于静态管道配置，难以适应动态工作负载条件，导致效率严重低下。

我们推出了 FlexPipe，这是一种新颖的系统，可以在运行时动态地重新配置管道架构，以解决这些基本限制。 FlexPipe 将模型分解为细粒度阶段，并根据实时请求模式分析智能调整管道粒度，实现三项关键创新：保留计算图约束的细粒度模型分区、具有一致缓存转换的飞行管道重构以及可导航 GPU 碎片的拓扑感知资源分配。对 82 个 GPU 集群的综合评估表明，与最先进的系统相比，FlexPipe 的资源效率提高了 8.5 倍，同时延迟降低了 38.3%，将 GPU 预留要求从峰值容量的 75% 降低到 30%。

items.title: Enabling Packet Spraying over Commodity RNICs with In-Network Support.
items.abstract:
AI training workloads exhibit unique traffic patterns that mismatch the ECMP load balancing of RDMA networks, leading to severe throughput degradation. While packet-level load balancing (e.g., random packet spraying, adaptive routing, etc.) offers a promising alternative to ECMP by providing fine-grained traffic distribution, it introduces out-of-order (OOO) packet arrivals. The reliable transport mechanism of current commodity RDMA NICs (RNICs) misinterprets these OOO arrivals as packet loss, causing spurious retransmissions and unnecessary slow starts.

We propose Themis, a lightweight middleware deployed on programmable switches, that eliminates the incompatibility between packet spraying and reliable transport in commodity RNICs without requiring any modifications to them. At its core, Themis applies PSN-based packet spraying at the source ToR switch, enabling it to infer whether an OOO packet and the expected packet traverse the same path. Building on this capability, Themis at the destination ToR analyzes NACKs triggered by OOO arrivals to determine whether they result from actual packet loss. It then blocks invalid NACKs while allowing valid ones to pass through. We implement a fully functional prototype of Themis using Tofino2. Experiments demonstrate that Themis reduces the communication completion time of Allreduce and Alltoall by 22.7%~35.4% and 29.3%~47.3%, respectively, compared to directly combining commodity RNICs and adaptive routing.
items.abstract_zh:
AI 训练工作负载表现出独特的流量模式，与 RDMA 网络的 ECMP 负载平衡不匹配，导致吞吐量严重下降。虽然数据包级负载平衡（例如，随机数据包喷射、自适应路由等）通过提供细粒度的流量分配，为 ECMP 提供了一种有前途的替代方案，但它引入了无序 (OOO) 数据包到达。当前商用 RDMA NIC (RNIC) 的可靠传输机制将这些 OOO 到达误解为数据包丢失，从而导致虚假重传和不必要的慢启动。

我们提出了 Themis，这是一种部署在可编程交换机上的轻量级中间件，它消除了商品 RNIC 中数据包喷射和可靠传输之间的不兼容性，而无需对其进行任何修改。 Themis 的核心是在源 ToR 交换机上应用基于 PSN 的数据包喷射，使其能够推断 OOO 数据包和预期数据包是否经过相同的路径。在此功能的基础上，目标 ToR 处的 Themis 会分析 OOO 到达触发的 NACK，以确定它们是否是由实际数据包丢失引起的。然后，它会阻止无效的 NACK，同时允许有效的 NACK 通过。我们使用 Tofino2 实现了 Themis 的全功能原型。实验表明，与直接结合商品RNIC和自适应路由相比，Themis将Allreduce和Alltoall的通信完成时间分别减少了22.7%~35.4%和29.3%~47.3%。

items.title: Proactive Change Risk Detection in Production Cloud Systems: ByteDance's Experience.
items.abstract: Modern cloud services rely on a high volume of changes for rapid innovation, yet these changes are a primary cause of production incidents. To manage this risk, industry practice employs tiered change management pipelines that concentrate static rules and human reviews. However, our analysis of ByteDance's cloud platform (Volcano Engine) reveals a critical long tail problem: while high-risk changes undergo extensive scrutiny, 78.1% of change-induced incidents originate from the sheer volume of low-risk changes that receive minimal review. At this scale, exhaustive manual review is fundamentally infeasible. To address this, we present Aegis, a novel knowledge-driven system that provides interpretable change risk assessment. Aegis automatically constructs a knowledge base from historical operational data, distilling it into generalized risk heuristics and identifying relevant precedent cases. When a new change is proposed, Aegis generates human-readable warnings grounded in this historical evidence, explaining why a change is risky. We have deployed Aegis in Volcano Engine's production environment for five months, where it processed tens of thousands of change requests. Its risk escalations achieved a 75% acceptance rate from production engineers and successfully prevented multiple potential incidents.
items.abstract_zh: 现代云服务依赖大量的变化来实现快速创新，但这些变化是生产事故的主要原因。为了管理这种风险，行业实践采用分层变更管理管道，集中静态规则和人工审核。然而，我们对字节跳动云平台（火山引擎）的分析揭示了一个关键的长尾问题：虽然高风险变更受到广泛审查，但78.1%的变更引发的事件源于大量低风险变更，这些变更受到的审查很少。在这种规模下，详尽的人工审核根本不可行。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 Aegis，这是一种新颖的知识驱动系统，可提供可解释的变更风险评估。 Aegis 自动根据历史运营数据构建知识库，将其提炼为广义风险启发法并识别相关先例。当提出新的变更时，Aegis 会根据历史证据生成人类可读的警告，解释变更为何存在风险。我们已经在 Volcano Engine 的生产环境中部署了 Aegis 五个月，处理了数万个变更请求。其风险升级获得了生产工程师75%的接受率，并成功阻止了多起潜在事件的发生。

items.title: RaidenSwap: A Multi-Swap Remote System for Multi-core Applications.
items.abstract:
Kernel-based remote memory systems are gaining traction in datacenters due to their significant improvement in memory utilization and their ability to transparently provide applications with unlimited memory capacity. However, the high degree of parallelism in contemporary applications leads to a significant demand for remote access throughput, which mismatches with the state-of-the-art kernel swap path due to its inherently limited parallelism. As a result, it cannot scale up the multi-core applications. We dive into the implementation of the swap path and identify the root cause behind it - significant lock contentions and inefficient swap tasks offloading.

To address these challenges, we introduce RaidenSwap, a kernel-based remote memory system that aims to improve swap path efficiency with two key ideas. 1) It introduces a page swapping framework that parallelizes page swapping on a core basis with little thread synchronization. This is achieved by allocating a separate LRU list to each core, thereby avoiding lock contention for the global one, while the collective effect of all local LRU lists retains the behavior of using a global LRU list. Meanwhile, this separation also enables memory semantics tracking on a fine-grain thread level, providing opportunities for semantic-aware swapping. 2) It offloads both prefetching and reclaiming tasks with smaller batches to a pool of worker threads, which efficiently harnesses fine-grained CPU idle time, minimizing disruption to application threads. We implemented a RaidenSwap prototype as a kernel module, ported it to multiple Linux kernels (v4.11 and v6.1), and evaluated it with both microbenchmarks and real applications. Our results show that RaidenSwap significantly outperforms state-of-the-art remote systems, such as Hermit, Canvas and Fastswap, by improving swap throughput by a factor of 1.8 to 16.5 and reducing remote access latency by 70%. Consequently, RaidenSwap accelerates the completion time of real applications by 8% to 70%.
items.abstract_zh:
基于内核的远程内存系统由于内存利用率的显着提高以及透明地为应用程序提供无限内存容量的能力而在数据中心中受到关注。然而，当代应用程序中的高度并行性导致对远程访问吞吐量的巨大需求，由于其固有的有限并行性，这与最先进的内核交换路径不匹配。因此，它无法扩展多核应用程序。我们深入研究交换路径的实现，并找出其背后的根本原因——严重的锁争用和低效的交换任务卸载。

为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了 RaidenSwap，这是一种基于内核的远程内存系统，旨在通过两个关键思想来提高交换路径效率。 1）它引入了一个页面交换框架，该框架在核心基础上并行化页面交换，几乎没有线程同步。这是通过为每个核心分配一个单独的 LRU 列表来实现的，从而避免全局 LRU 列表的锁争用，而所有本地 LRU 列表的集体效果保留了使用全局 LRU 列表的行为。同时，这种分离还可以在细粒度线程级别上进行内存语义跟踪，从而为语义感知交换提供机会。 2) 它将小批量的预取和回收任务卸载到工作线程池，从而有效地利用细粒度的 CPU 空闲时间，最大限度地减少对应用程序线程的干扰。我们将 RaidenSwap 原型实现为内核模块，将其移植到多个 Linux 内核（v4.11 和 v6.1），并使用微基准测试和实际应用程序对其进行评估。我们的结果表明，RaidenSwap 的性能显着优于最先进的远程系统，例如 Hermit、Canvas 和 Fastswap，将交换吞吐量提高了 1.8 至 16.5 倍，并将远程访问延迟降低了 70%。因此，RaidenSwap 将实际应用程序的完成时间加快了 8% 至 70%。

items.title: AIMS: Cost-Efficient LLM-Based Agent Deployment in Hybrid Cloud-Edge Environments.
items.abstract: In the realm of AI, large language models (LLMs) like GPT-5, central to the operation of AI agents, predominantly operate in the cloud, incurring high operational costs. With local-based small language models (SLMs) becoming more accurate, the necessity of cloud-exclusive processing is being reconsidered. An AI agent's response to a user's request comprises a series of subtasks or iterations. Existing approaches choose either an LLM or SLM for the entire request to ensure similar outputs, but this is ineffective for AI agents as SLMs may generate differing subtasks, compromising final accuracy. In this paper, we first conduct experimental analysis to understand the features of AI agent operations. Leveraging our findings, we propose the Adaptive Iteration-level Model Selector (AIMS), a lightweight scheduler to automatically partition an AI agent's subtasks between local-based SLM and cloud-based LLM. AIMS considers the varying subtask features and strategically decides the location for each subtask in order to use SLM as much as possible while maintaining the accuracy level. Our experimental results demonstrate that AIMS achieves up to a 27.5% relative improvement in accuracy and up to 31.4% relative increase in SLM usage compared to HybridLLM. It offloads 83.4% of subtasks to a local SLM while attaining similar accuracy on average compared with the cloud-only LLM approach.
items.abstract_zh: 在人工智能领域，像 GPT-5 这样的大型语言模型（LLM）是人工智能代理运行的核心，主要在云端运行，从而产生高昂的运营成本。随着基于本地的小语言模型 (SLM) 变得更加准确，云专有处理的必要性正在被重新考虑。人工智能代理对用户请求的响应包括一系列子任务或迭代。现有方法为整个请求选择 LLM 或 SLM，以确保类似的输出，但这对于 AI 代理来说是无效的，因为 SLM 可能会生成不同的子任务，从而影响最终的准确性。在本文中，我们首先进行实验分析来了解AI代理操作的特点。利用我们的发现，我们提出了自适应迭代级模型选择器（AIMS），这是一种轻量级调度程序，可以在基于本地的 SLM 和基于云的 LLM 之间自动划分 AI 代理的子任务。 AIMS 考虑不同的子任务特征并战略性地决定每个子任务的位置，以便在保持准确性水平的同时尽可能多地使用 SLM。我们的实验结果表明，与 HybridLLM 相比，AIMS 的准确性相对提高了 27.5%，SLM 使用率相对提高了 31.4%。与纯云 LLM 方法相比，它将 83.4% 的子任务卸载到本地 SLM，同时平均达到相似的准确度。

items.title: No More Translation at Runtime: LLM-Empowered Static Binary Translation.
items.abstract:
While AArch64 CPUs are becoming strong market contenders, their software ecosystem lags behind the mature x86-64 environment, hindering the adoption of the new architectures and impacting user experience. Binary translation bridges this divide by converting binary code from one architecture (e.g., x86-64) to run on another (e.g., AArch64), allowing legacy software to benefit from modern hardware's performance and energy efficiency advantages.

Current translation methods are typically either dynamic, which adds significant runtime overhead, or static, which struggles with reliability due to the inherent complexities of binary analysis. This paper introduces a new static, assembly-to-assembly translation paradigm that transforms binary code ahead of execution, generating portable, efficient nativelike binaries that run on AArch64 devices without runtime frameworks. Benefiting from recent breakthroughs in large language models (LLMs), we provide a practical and automated translation engine that produces high-quality code with minimal human intervention. To ensure correctness, we introduce a crucial verification step, where we split the assembly code into simplified snippets, enabling efficient and scalable semantic verification.

Our evaluation shows that this approach significantly outperforms existing open-source solutions with a large margin, producing binaries with near-native performance. Furthermore, it shows substantial improvements over the leading industrial translator, ExaGear, illuminating a promising new direction for cross-architecture binary translation research.
items.abstract_zh:
虽然AArch64 CPU正在成为强有力的市场竞争者，但其软件生态系统落后于成熟的x86-64环境，阻碍了新架构的采用并影响了用户体验。二进制转换通过将二进制代码从一种架构（例如 x86-64）转换为在另一种架构（例如 AArch64）上运行来弥合这一鸿沟，从而使传统软件能够从现代硬件的性能和能效优势中受益。

当前的翻译方法通常是动态的，这会增加大量的运行时间开销；或者是静态的，由于二进制分析固有的复杂性，可靠性会受到影响。本文介绍了一种新的静态、程序集到程序集转换范例，该范例可以在执行之前转换二进制代码，生成可移植、高效的类似本机的二进制文件，可以在没有运行时框架的 AArch64 设备上运行。受益于大型语言模型 (LLM) 的最新突破，我们提供了实用的自动化翻译引擎，可以在最少的人工干预下生成高质量的代码。为了确保正确性，我们引入了一个关键的验证步骤，将汇编代码分割成简化的片段，从而实现高效且可扩展的语义验证。

我们的评估表明，这种方法的性能明显优于现有的开源解决方案，并且生成的二进制文件具有接近本机的性能。此外，它比领先的工业翻译器 ExaGear 有了显着的改进，为跨架构二进制翻译研究指明了一个有前途的新方向。

items.title: Accelerating Transactional Execution via Processing-In-Memory.
items.abstract:
Processing-in-Memory (PIM) integrates compute capabilities directly into memory modules to reduce costly data movement, promising large performance gains for data-intensive workloads. In PIM systems, small processors—Data Processing Units (DPUs)—are embedded near memory banks to execute computations close to where data resides. Although PIM has shown strong benefits for analytical tasks, supporting transactional workloads such as online transaction processing (OLTP) remains challenging due to decentralized DPUs and the lack of efficient hardware coordination mechanisms.

We present PIM-TIDE (Processing-in-Memory with Transactional Isolation via Deterministic Execution), a new transaction execution platform designed for PIM architectures. PIM-TIDE provides a lightweight software-based coordination mechanism that enables transactions to span multiple DPUs, while ensuring consistency, atomicity, and isolation. By using the CPU selectively for transaction coordination, PIM-TIDE avoids the performance penalties of frequent inter-DPU communication. We evaluate PIM-TIDE on real PIM hardware (UPMEM) and show that it achieves scalable transaction processing with low overhead, both in terms of performance and energy efficiency, in TPC-C based workloads.
items.abstract_zh:
内存处理 (PIM) 将计算功能直接集成到内存模块中，以减少成本高昂的数据移动，从而为数据密集型工作负载带来巨大的性能提升。在 PIM 系统中，小型处理器——数据处理单元 (DPU)——嵌入在存储体附近，以在数据所在位置附近执行计算。尽管 PIM 在分析任务方面显示出强大的优势，但由于分散的 DPU 和缺乏高效的硬件协调机制，支持在线事务处理 (OLTP) 等事务工作负载仍然具有挑战性。

我们推出 PIM-TIDE（通过确定性执行进行事务隔离的内存处理），这是一个专为 PIM 架构设计的新事务执行平台。 PIM-TIDE提供了一种轻量级的基于软件的协调机制，使事务能够跨越多个DPU，同时确保一致性、原子性和隔离性。通过选择性地使用 CPU 进行事务协调，PIM-TIDE 避免了频繁的 DPU 间通信带来的性能损失。我们在真实 PIM 硬件 (UPMEM) 上评估 PIM-TIDE，并表明它在基于 TPC-C 的工作负载中在性能和能源效率方面实现了低开销的可扩展事务处理。

items.title: Bridging the GPU Utilization Gap: Predictive Multi-Dimensional Resource Scheduling for AI Workloads.
items.abstract:
Modern AI data centers face a critical paradox: while machine learning workloads dominate infrastructure demands, actual GPU utilization remains consistently low. Existing schedulers fail to coordinate heterogeneous resources effectively, lack predictive capabilities for dynamic workloads, and cannot balance isolation requirements with sharing optimization in multi-tenant clusters. This paper presents Wind, a novel resource scheduler that bridges the GPU utilization gap through predictive scheduling and geometric resource coordination. Wind introduces three key innovations: (1) a resource prediction framework that leverages historical execution patterns to forecast task requirements and completion times with high accuracy;(2) a unified scheduling architecture supporting isolation, sharing, preemption, and prioritization policies that eliminate resource fragmentation while maintaining performance guarantees; and (3) a Hilbert curve-based multi-dimensional scheduling algorithm that maps CPU-memory-GPU resource space to preserve spatial locality while achieving linear computational complexity.

Our evaluation on a 139–node cluster demonstrates that Wind consistently outperforms K8s Default, DRF, and Synergy across diverse workloads. It reduces average response time by 33–48%, lowers P99 JCT by 37%, and improves throughput by up to 46.6% under bursty loads. GPU utilization remains above 92%, while medium-load scenarios yield ***up-mei to 25% resource savings, highlighting the practicality of Wind for production-scale AI clusters.
items.abstract_zh:
现代人工智能数据中心面临着一个关键的悖论：虽然机器学习工作负载主导着基础设施需求，但实际的 GPU 利用率仍然很低。现有调度程序无法有效协调异构资源，缺乏动态工作负载的预测能力，并且无法平衡多租户集群中的隔离要求和共享优化。本文介绍了 Wind，一种新颖的资源调度程序，它通过预测调度和几何资源协调来弥补 GPU 利用率差距。 Wind引入了三项关键创新：（1）资源预测框架，利用历史执行模式来高精度预测任务需求和完成时间；（2）统一的调度架构，支持隔离、共享、抢占和优先级策略，消除资源碎片，同时保持性能保证； (3)基于希尔伯特曲线的多维调度算法，映射CPU-内存-GPU资源空间以保留空间局部性，同时实现线性计算复杂度。

我们对 139 节点集群的评估表明，Wind 在不同的工作负载中始终优于 K8s Default、DRF 和 Synergy。它将平均响应时间缩短了 33-48%，将 P99 JCT 降低了 37%，并将突发负载下的吞吐量提高了 46.6%。 GPU利用率保持在92%以上，中等负载场景下资源节省高达25%，凸显了Wind对于生产规模AI集群的实用性。

items.title: ASIC-based Compression Accelerators for Storage Systems: Design, Placement, and Profiling Insights.
items.abstract: Lossless compression imposes significant computational overhead on datacenters when performed on CPUs. Hardware compression and decompression processing units (CDPUs) can alleviate this overhead, but optimal algorithm selection, microarchitectural design, and system-level placement of CDPUs are still not well understood. We present the design of an ASIC-based in-storage CDPU and provide a comprehensive end-to-end evaluation against two leading ASIC accelerators, Intel QAT 8970 and QAT 4xxx. The evaluation spans three dominant CDPU placement regimes: peripheral, on-chip, and in-storage. Our results reveal: ( i ) acute sensitivity of throughput and latency to CDPU placement and interconnection, ( ii ) strong correlation between compression efficiency and data patterns/layouts, ( iii ) placement-driven divergences between microbenchmark gains and real-application speedups, ( iv ) discrepancies between module and system-level power efficiency, and ( v ) scalability and multi-tenant interference issues of various CDPUs. These findings motivate a placement-aware, cross-layer rethinking of hardware (de)compression for hyperscale storage infrastructures.
items.abstract_zh: 在 CPU 上执行时，无损压缩会给数据中心带来巨大的计算开销。硬件压缩和解压缩处理单元 (CDPU) 可以减轻这种开销，但 CDPU 的最佳算法选择、微架构设计和系统级布局仍然没有得到很好的理解。我们展示基于 ASIC 的存储内 CDPU 的设计，并针对两种领先的 ASIC 加速器（英特尔 QAT 8970 和 QAT 4xxx）提供全面的端到端评估。该评估涵盖三种主要的 CDPU 放置方式：外设、片上和存储内。我们的结果揭示了：(i) 吞吐量和延迟对 CDPU 布局和互连的高度敏感性，(ii) 压缩效率和数据模式/布局之间的强相关性，(iii) 微基准增益和实际应用加速之间布局驱动的差异，(iv) 模块和系统级功率效率之间的差异，以及 (v) 各种 CDPU 的可扩展性和多租户干扰问题。这些发现激发了对超大规模存储基础设施的硬件（解）压缩的位置感知、跨层重新思考。

items.title: Five Minutes of DDoS Brings down Tor: DDoS Attacks on the Tor Directory Protocol and Mitigations.
items.abstract: The Tor network offers network anonymity to its users by routing their traffic through a sequence of relays. A group of nine directory authorities maintains information about all available relay nodes using a distributed directory protocol. We observe that the current protocol makes a strong synchrony assumption, which makes it vulnerable to natural as well as adversarial non-synchronous communication scenarios over the Internet. In this paper, we show that it is possible to cause a failure in the Tor directory protocol by targeting a majority of the authorities for only five minutes using a well-executed distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attack. We demonstrate this attack in a controlled environment and show that it is cost-effective for as little as $53.28 per month to disrupt the protocol and to effectively bring down the entire Tor network. To mitigate this problem, we consider the popular partial synchrony assumption that ensures protocol security even when the network delays are large and unknown initially. We design a new Tor directory protocol that leverages a standard partial-synchronous consensus protocol to solve this problem, while also proving its security. We have implemented a prototype in Rust, demonstrating comparable performance to the current protocol.
items.abstract_zh: Tor 网络通过一系列中继路由用户的流量，从而为用户提供网络匿名性。九个目录权限组使用分布式目录协议维护有关所有可用中继节点的信息。我们观察到，当前协议做出了很强的同步假设，这使得它容易受到互联网上自然和对抗性非同步通信场景的影响。在本文中，我们表明，使用执行良好的分布式拒绝服务 (DDoS) 攻击，仅针对大多数权限五分钟，就有可能导致 Tor 目录协议失败。我们在受控环境中演示了这种攻击，并表明每月仅需 53.28 美元即可破坏协议并有效地瘫痪整个 Tor 网络，具有成本效益。为了缓解这个问题，我们考虑流行的部分同步假设，即使网络延迟很大且最初未知，也能确保协议安全。我们设计了一种新的 Tor 目录协议，利用标准的部分同步共识协议来解决这个问题，同时也证明了其安全性。我们已经用 Rust 实现了一个原型，展示了与当前协议相当的性能。

items.title: Fuzzing Enterprise-Grade Blockchain Systems: Industrial Practice and Solutions.
items.abstract:
Blockchain has been widely adopted across diverse sectors. Yet, enterprise-grade systems remain vulnerable to critical flaws that undermine stability and security. Although academic fuzzing tools such as LOKI and Tyr have shown effectiveness in detecting such issues, their integration into industrial practice remains challenging.

In this paper, we present the industry practice of implementing system-level fuzzing techniques on enterprise-level blockchains. We summarize three main obstacles in industry deployment, namely the hard-to-build state models for fuzzing, the slow convergence of fuzz testing within CI/CD pipelines, and the difficulty of adapting logical bug oracles across diverse blockchain implementations. To address these obstacles, we design Thor, a practical fuzzing framework for industry blockchain systems. Thor uses active and passive packet generation for early stage state-aware testing. To perform efficient fuzzing under strict CI/CD time budgets, Thor adopts a two-tier parallel fuzzing method. And Thor also uses LLM-based oracles to extract logic properties from node logs. Over these years, Thor has discovered 87 bugs in 9 commercial blockchain systems, such as Chain-maker, Go-Ethereum, and WeBank FISCO BCOS.
items.abstract_zh:
区块链已在各个领域得到广泛采用。然而，企业级系统仍然容易受到破坏稳定性和安全性的严重缺陷的影响。尽管 LOKI 和 Tyr 等学术模糊工具已显示出检测此类问题的有效性，但将它们集成到工业实践中仍然具有挑战性。

在本文中，我们介绍了在企业级区块链上实施系统级模糊技术的行业实践。我们总结了行业部署中的三个主要障碍，即难以构建模糊测试的状态模型、CI/CD 管道内模糊测试的缓慢收敛以及跨不同区块链实现调整逻辑错误预言的难度。为了解决这些障碍，我们设计了 Thor，一个用于行业区块链系统的实用模糊测试框架。 Thor 使用主动和被动数据包生成来进行早期状态感知测试。为了在严格的 CI/CD 时间预算下执行高效的模糊测试，Thor 采用了两层并行模糊测试方法。 Thor 还使用基于 LLM 的预言机从节点日志中提取逻辑属性。这些年来，Thor 在 Chain-maker、Go-Ethereum、微众银行 FISCO BCOS 等 9 个商业区块链系统中发现了 87 个 bug。

items.title: A Case for Elastic Quantum Error Correction Decoders.
items.abstract: Large-scale quantum computers promise transformative speedups, but their viability hinges on fast and reliable quantum error correction (QEC). At the center of QEC are decoders—classical algorithms running on hardware such as FPGAs, GPUs, or CPUs that process error syndromes to detect errors every microsecond to preserve fault-tolerance. Quantum processors, therefore, operate not in isolation, but as accelerators tightly coupled with powerful classical digital hardware. A key challenge is that decoder demand fluctuates unpredictably: bursts of activity can require orders of magnitude more decodes than idle periods. Provisioning hardware for the worst case wastes resources, while provisioning for the average case risks catastrophic slowdowns. We show that this mismatch is a systems problem of capacity planning and scheduling, and propose a two-level framework that treats decoders as shared accelerators managed by the quantum operating system. Our approach reduces decoder requirements by 10–40% across fault-tolerant benchmarks, demonstrating that efficient decoder scheduling is essential to making FTQC practical.
items.abstract_zh: 大规模量子计算机有望带来革命性的加速，但其可行性取决于快速可靠的量子纠错（QEC）。 QEC 的核心是解码器，即在 FPGA、GPU 或 CPU 等硬件上运行的经典算法，用于处理错误综合症，每微秒检测错误以保持容错能力。因此，量子处理器不是孤立运行的，而是作为与强大的经典数字硬件紧密耦合的加速器。一个关键的挑战是解码器需求的波动不可预测：突发活动可能需要比空闲期多几个数量级的解码。为最坏的情况配置硬件会浪费资源，而为一般情况配置硬件则可能会导致灾难性的速度下降。我们证明这种不匹配是容量规划和调度的系统问题，并提出了一个两级框架，将解码器视为由量子操作系统管理的共享加速器。我们的方法在容错基准测试中将解码器要求降低了 10-40%，这表明高效的解码器调度对于使 FTQC 实用化至关重要。

items.title: Low-Compilation-Cost Register Allocation in LLVM-Based Binary Translation.
items.abstract:
Efficiently allocating guest architecture registers to host registers is a crucial technique for improving performance in dynamic binary translation. Translators typically enlarge code regions to reduce context-switching overhead and expose more optimization opportunities. Traditional approaches load guest registers upon entering a code region and save them upon exiting, aiming to retain guest registers in host registers for as long as possible. However, as the size of code region increases, the growing number of intermediate variables and the increasing complexity of control flow lead to higher computational costs for register allocation, thereby increasing compilation overhead.

This paper investigates the causes of increased register allocation overhead in LLVM-based binary translators and proposes a low-compilation-cost strategy called LCCRA. It explicitly restores the semantics of accessing physical guest registers in LLVM IR, facilitating efficient register allocation on mainstream processor architectures. LCCRA propagates guest register values using virtual registers within each basic block. For values that need to cross basic block boundaries, virtual registers are introduced as substitutes for load operations where necessary, and redundant store operations are eliminated based on control flow analysis. Since this optimization is performed at the LLVM IR level, it does not interfere with existing LLVM optimizations, making it applicable to various LLVM-based binary translators.

We implement our strategy in CrossDBT, an LLVM-based binary translator. Evaluation on PARSEC benchmark suite, considering varying code region sizes across two translation scenarios (x86-64 → x86-64 and x86-64 → AArch64), demonstrates that LCCRA achieves a 5.76%-7.79% reduction in end-to-end latency and a 69.55%-74.98% reduction in register allocation time when host registers are limited. In register-abundant scenarios, LCCRA still delivers slightly better end-to-end latency while consistently reducing compilation overhead.
items.abstract_zh:
有效地将客户架构寄存器分配给主机寄存器是提高动态二进制翻译性能的关键技术。翻译器通常会扩大代码区域以减少上下文切换开销并提供更多优化机会。传统方法在进入代码区域时加载访客寄存器并在退出时保存它们，旨在尽可能长时间地将访客寄存器保留在主机寄存器中。然而，随着代码区域大小的增加，中间变量数量的增加和控制流的复杂性增加导致寄存器分配的计算成本更高，从而增加编译开销。

本文研究了基于 LLVM 的二进制翻译器中寄存器分配开销增加的原因，并提出了一种称为 LCCRA 的低编译成本策略。它显式地恢复了 LLVM IR 中访问物理访客寄存器的语义，有助于主流处理器架构上的高效寄存器分配。 LCCRA 使用每个基本块内的虚拟寄存器来传播访客寄存器值。对于需要跨越基本块边界的值，在必要时引入虚拟寄存器作为加载操作的替代品，并根据控制流分析消除冗余存储操作。由于此优化是在 LLVM IR 级别执行的，因此不会干扰现有的 LLVM 优化，使其适用于各种基于 LLVM 的二进制转换器。

我们在 CrossDBT（一种基于 LLVM 的二进制翻译器）中实施我们的策略。对 PARSEC 基准套件的评估考虑了两种转换场景（x86-64 → x86-64 和 x86-64 → AArch64）的不同代码区域大小，结果表明，当主机寄存器有限时，LCCRA 实现了端到端延迟减少 5.76%-7.79%，寄存器分配时间减少 69.55%-74.98%。在寄存器丰富的场景中，LCCRA 仍然提供稍微更好的端到端延迟，同时持续降低编译开销。

items.title: In-Production Characterization of an Open Source Serverless Platform and New Scaling Strategies.
items.abstract:
Serverless computing has become more popular and evolved to support more complex tasks than the original Function as a Service (FaaS) model. The design of serverless systems has advanced to accommodate application demands and offer flexibility. Careful characterization of modern serverless systems and understanding of current gaps are warranted. Publicly available datasets on workloads in select production serverless systems do not fully represent all offerings or capture traces at the required time resolution to identify changes in application-level request-response patterns.

We characterize - and make available - production traces from a major public serverless provider with over 1.9 billion invocations spanning over two months. Our dataset is the first to characterize an open-source platform with large-scale trace data, millisecond-scale arrival times, and user configurations for pod concurrency and minimum pod scaling. Using this dataset, we provide new insights for optimizing serverless platforms.

With our insights, we design and implement FeMux, a serverless lifetime management system. FeMux multiplexes lightweight forecasters and uses a Representative Unified Metric (RUM) to decouple metrics from serverless platform implementations. This allows providers like us to update metrics flexibly or support multiple system objectives simultaneously. We prototype FeMux on the Knative platform and evaluate its benefits.
items.abstract_zh:
无服务器计算变得越来越流行，并且发展到支持比原始功能即服务 (FaaS) 模型更复杂的任务。无服务器系统的设计已经先进，可以满足应用程序需求并提供灵活性。有必要仔细描述现代无服务器系统并了解当前的差距。选定生产无服务器系统中工作负载的公开可用数据集并不能完全代表所有产品或以所需的时间分辨率捕获跟踪来识别应用程序级请求响应模式的变化。

我们描述并提供来自主要公共无服务器提供商的生产跟踪，该提供商在两个多月内调用了超过 19 亿次。我们的数据集是第一个描述开源平台特征的数据集，具有大规模跟踪数据、毫秒级到达时间以及 Pod 并发和最小 Pod 扩展的用户配置。 Using this dataset, we provide new insights for optimizing serverless platforms.

凭借我们的见解，我们设计并实现了 FeMux，一个无服务器生命周期管理系统。 FeMux 复用轻量级预测器，并使用代表性统一指标 (RUM) 将指标与无服务器平台实现解耦。这使得像我们这样的提供商能够灵活地更新指标或同时支持多个系统目标。我们在 Knative 平台上对 FeMux 进行原型设计并评估其优势。

items.title: Squeezy: Rapid VM Memory Reclamation for Serverless Functions.
items.abstract: Resource elasticity is one of the key defining characteristics of the Function-as-a-Service (FaaS) serverless computing paradigm. While compute resources assigned to VM-sandboxed functions can be seamlessly adjusted on the fly, memory elasticity remains challenging. Hot(un)plugging memory resources suffers from long reclamation latencies and occupies valuable CPU resources. We identify the obliviousness of the OS memory manager to the hotplugged memory as the key issue hindering hot-unplug performance, and design Squeezy, a novel approach for fast and efficient VM memory hot(un)plug, targeting VM-sandboxed serverless functions. Our key insight is that by segregating hotplugged memory regions from regular VM memory, we are able to bound the lifetime of allocations within these regions thus enabling their fast and efficient reclamation. We implement Squeezy in Linux v6.6 as an extension to the OS memory manager. Our evaluation reveals that Squeezy is an order-of-magnitude faster than state-of-the-art, keeping tail latency bounded, when reclaiming VM memory, achieving sub-second reclamation of multiple GiBs of memory while serving realistic FaaS load.
items.abstract_zh: 资源弹性是功能即服务 (FaaS) 无服务器计算范式的关键定义特征之一。虽然分配给虚拟机沙盒功能的计算资源可以动态无缝调整，但内存弹性仍然具有挑战性。热（拔）插内存资源会遭受较长的回收延迟并占用宝贵的 CPU 资源。我们认为操作系统内存管理器对热插拔内存的忽视是阻碍热拔出性能的关键问题，并设计了 Squeezy，这是一种快速高效的 VM 内存热（拔）插新方法，针对 VM 沙盒无服务器功能。我们的主要见解是，通过将热插拔内存区域与常规虚拟机内存分离，我们能够限制这些区域内分配的生命周期，从而实现快速高效的回收。我们在 Linux v6.6 中实现 Squeezy 作为操作系统内存管理器的扩展。我们的评估表明，Squeezy 比最先进的技术快一个数量级，在回收 VM 内存时保持尾部延迟有限，实现亚秒级回收多个 GiB 内存，同时提供实际的 FaaS 负载。

items.title: MinatoLoader: Accelerating Machine Learning Training Through Efficient Data Preprocessing.
items.abstract:
Machine learning (ML) frameworks, such as PyTorch and TensorFlow, rely on data loaders to preprocess data before feeding it to accelerators. When preprocessing is inefficiently pipelined, GPUs can remain idle over long periods of time, leading to substantial training delays. For example, PyTorch's default data loaders can cause up to 76% GPU idleness. A key bottleneck is the variability in preprocessing time across samples within the same dataset. Existing data loaders are oblivious to this variability, training all samples uniformly. In this case, a single slow sample can stall the entire batch, causing head-of-line blocking.

We present MinatoLoader, a general-purpose data loader for PyTorch that accelerates training and improves GPU utilization under single-server, multi-GPU settings. It continuously prepares data in background and constructs batches by prioritizing fast-to-process samples, while slower samples are processed in parallel.

Experiments conducted over NVIDIA V100 and A100 GPUs show that MinatoLoader accelerates training by up to 7.5× (3.6× on average) over PyTorch DataLoader and Pecan, and up to 3× (2.2× on average) over DALI. It also increases average GPU utilization from 46% with PyTorch to 90%, while preserving model accuracy and enabling faster convergence.
items.abstract_zh:
PyTorch 和 TensorFlow 等机器学习 (ML) 框架依靠数据加载器在将数据输入加速器之前对数据进行预处理。当预处理效率低下时，GPU 可能会长时间保持空闲状态，从而导致严重的训练延迟。例如，PyTorch 的默认数据加载器可能会导致高达 76% 的 GPU 空闲。一个关键瓶颈是同一数据集中样本的预处理时间的可变性。现有的数据加载器忽略了这种可变性，统一训练所有样本。在这种情况下，单个缓慢的样本可能会导致整个批次停止，从而导致队头阻塞。

我们推出了 MinatoLoader，这是一种适用于 PyTorch 的通用数据加载器，可在单服务器、多 GPU 设置下加速训练并提高 GPU 利用率。它在后台持续准备数据，并通过优先处理快速处理的样本来构建批次，同时并行处理较慢的样本。

在 NVIDIA V100 和 A100 GPU 上进行的实验表明，MinatoLoader 的训练速度比 PyTorch DataLoader 和 Pecan 提高了 7.5 倍（平均 3.6 倍），比 DALI 提高了 3 倍（平均 2.2 倍）。它还将平均 GPU 利用率从 PyTorch 的 46% 提高到 90%，同时保持模型准确性并实现更快的收敛。

items.title: Carbon-Aware Continuous Learning for Sustainable Real-Time Machine Learning Analytics.
items.abstract: Real-time machine learning (ML) analytics models deployed on edge servers often experience degraded inference accuracy due to data drift. Continuous learning mitigates this by periodically retraining models using newly collected data. However, retraining incurs significant computational overhead, increasing energy consumption and carbon footprint several-fold. Existing approaches for reducing carbon footprint predominantly focus on general workload scheduling strategies, such as shifting jobs to periods or regions with lower carbon intensity. However, they neglect continuous-learning-specific parameters like data labeling model, retraining threshold, and retraining hyperparameters. Consequently, these approaches miss opportunities to further reduce the carbon footprint and enhance inference accuracy in continuous learning systems under dynamic data drift. In this paper, we propose a novel Carbon-footprint-aware Continuous Learning (CCL) scheme that minimizes carbon emissions during model retraining without sacrificing inference accuracy. Distinct from prior workload scheduling approaches, CCL adaptively adjusts labeling model, retraining threshold, and retraining hyperparameters based on predictive models that estimate data drift severity and carbon intensity dynamics. Our adaptive real-time optimization approach consistently achieves a near-optimal balance between accuracy and carbon footprint under dynamic conditions. Experimental results demonstrate that CCL reduces operational carbon footprint by up to 68.5% compared to state-of-the-art carbon-agnostic methods, with negligible accuracy degradation.
items.abstract_zh: 部署在边缘服务器上的实时机器学习 (ML) 分析模型通常会因数据漂移而导致推理准确性下降。持续学习通过使用新收集的数据定期重新训练模型来缓解这种情况。然而，再培训会产生大量的计算开销，使能源消耗和碳足迹增加数倍。现有的减少碳足迹的方法主要集中于一般工作负载调度策略，例如将工作转移到碳强度较低的时期或地区。然而，他们忽略了连续学习特定的参数，例如数据标记模型、再训练阈值和再训练超参数。因此，这些方法错过了进一步减少碳足迹和提高动态数据漂移下连续学习系统的推理准确性的机会。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的碳足迹感知连续学习（CCL）方案，该方案可以在不牺牲推理准确性的情况下最大限度地减少模型再训练期间的碳排放。与之前的工作负载调度方法不同，CCL 基于估计数据漂移严重性和碳强度动态的预测模型自适应调整标签模型、再训练阈值和再训练超参数。我们的自适应实时优化方法始终在动态条件下实现准确性和碳足迹之间的近乎最佳平衡。实验结果表明，与最先进的碳不可知方法相比，CCL 可以将运营碳足迹减少高达 68.5%，且精度下降可以忽略不计。

items.title: Prediction-Informed Power Management for General-Purpose Compute Servers.
items.abstract: This paper presents PIP (Prediction-Informed Power), a power control framework for general-purpose compute servers. PIP introduces two key innovations: (1) a machine learning-based power model that predicts the impact of hypothetical CPU throttling actions before execution, and (2) a prediction-informed control loop that selects CPU configurations to maximize performance and power utilization based on these predictions. By leveraging finegrained runtime CPU metrics, PIP can accurately estimate counterfactual power usage, allowing the control system to align power demand with the budget more quickly. Unlike traditional reactive approaches, PIP maintains effective control under frequent budget fluctuations, achieving safe oversubscription by up to 70%. Our evaluation on diverse application workloads, none of which are included in the model's training set, shows that PIP yields up to a 3.2× speedup over a state-of-the-art feedback-based system for single-application runs, and up to a 3.4× speedup for multi-application scenarios under power constraints.
items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了 PIP（预测信息功率），这是一种用于通用计算服务器的功率控制框架。 PIP 引入了两项关键创新：(1) 基于机器学习的功耗模型，可在执行前预测假设的 CPU 节流操作的影响；(2) 基于预测的控制循环，可根据这些预测选择 CPU 配置以最大限度地提高性能和功耗。通过利用细粒度的运行时 CPU 指标，PIP 可以准确估计反事实的功耗，使控制系统能够更快地使功耗需求与预算保持一致。与传统的反应式方法不同，PIP 在频繁的预算波动下仍能保持有效控制，实现高达 70% 的安全超额认购。我们对不同应用程序工作负载（均不包含在模型的训练集中）的评估表明，对于单应用程序运行，PIP 比最先进的基于反馈的系统可实现高达 3.2 倍的加速，并且在功率限制下对于多应用程序场景可实现高达 3.4 倍的加速。

items.title: FlexiWalker: Extensible GPU Framework for Efficient Dynamic Random Walks with Runtime Adaptation.
items.abstract: Dynamic random walks are fundamental to various graph analysis applications, offering advantages by adapting to evolving graph properties. Their runtime-dependent transition probabilities break down the pre-computation strategy that underpins most existing CPU and GPU static random walk optimizations. This leaves practitioners suffering from suboptimal frameworks and having to write hand-tuned kernels that do not adapt to workload diversity. To handle this issue, we present FlexiWalker , the first GPU framework that delivers efficient, workload-generic support for dynamic random walks. Our design-space study shows that rejection sampling and reservoir sampling are more suitable than other sampling techniques under massive parallelism. Thus, we devise (i) new high-performance kernels for them that eliminate global reductions, redundant memory accesses, and random-number generation. Given the necessity of choosing the best-fitting sampling strategy at runtime, we adopt (ii) a lightweight first-order cost model that selects the faster kernel per node at runtime. To enhance usability, we introduce (iii) a compile-time component that automatically specializes user-supplied walk logic into optimized building blocks. On various dynamic random walk workloads with real-world graphs, FlexiWalker outperforms the best published CPU/GPU baselines by geometric means of 73.44× and 5.91×, respectively, while successfully executing workloads that prior systems cannot support. We open-source FlexiWalker in https://github.com/AIS-SNU/FlexiWalker.
items.abstract_zh: 动态随机游走是各种图分析应用的基础，通过适应不断变化的图属性来提供优势。它们依赖于运行时的转换概率打破了支撑大多数现有 CPU 和 GPU 静态随机游走优化的预计算策略。这使得从业者遭受次优框架的困扰，并且不得不编写不适应工作负载多样性的手动调整内核。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 FlexiWalker，这是第一个为动态随机游走提供高效、通用工作负载支持的 GPU 框架。我们的设计空间研究表明，在大规模并行性下，拒绝采样和储层采样比其他采样技术更合适。因此，我们为它们设计了（i）新的高性能内核，消除了全局缩减、冗余内存访问和随机数生成。考虑到在运行时选择最适合的采样策略的必要性，我们采用（ii）轻量级的一阶成本模型，该模型在运行时为每个节点选择更快的内核。为了增强可用性，我们引入了 (iii) 一个编译时组件，该组件自动将用户提供的行走逻辑专门化为优化的构建块。在具有真实世界图的各种动态随机游走工作负载上，FlexiWalker 的性能分别以 73.44× 和 5.91× 的几何平均值优于已发布的最佳 CPU/GPU 基线，同时成功执行了先前系统无法支持的工作负载。我们在 https://github.com/AIS-SNU/FlexiWalker 中开源了 FlexiWalker。
